# RBC

标注 ※ 的是必考题库

# ※ Example 1 标准 RBC 模型：分散化经济

经济中有一个代表性居民，一个代表性厂商。其中居民持有资本，且经济中仅有实物资本。

居民的效用函数为

Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k){\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^ {+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k}) Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)

其中 NtN_tNt​ 为居民的劳动供给，CtC_tCt​ 为居民的消费，∂u/∂C>0,∂2u/∂C2<0,∂u/∂N<0,∂2u/∂N2<0\partial u/\partial C >0,\partial ^2 u/\partial C^2 < 0,\partial u /\partial N < 0,\partial ^2 u /\partial N^2 < 0∂u/∂C>0,∂2u/∂C2<0,∂u/∂N<0,∂2u/∂N2<0。

居民的融资约束为

Ct+It≤WtNt+RtKt+Πt+TtC_t+I_t \leq W_tN_t + R_t K_t + \Pi_t + T_t Ct​+It​≤Wt​Nt​+Rt​Kt​+Πt​+Tt​

其中 ItI_tIt​ 为居民的实际实物投资支出，KtK_tKt​ 为居民持有的资本，RtR_tRt​ 为资本边际回报，WtW_tWt​ 为劳动的工资，Πt\Pi_tΠt​ 为企业利润，TtT_tTt​ 为政府的转移支付。

当资本投资支出为 ItI_tIt​，资本存量为 KtK_tKt​ 时，新生成的资本数目为 QI(Kt,It)Q^I(K_t,I_t)QI(Kt​,It​)，资本积累方程为

Kt+1=QI(Kt,It)+(1−δ)KtK_{t+1}=Q^I(K_t,I_t)+ (1-\delta)K_t Kt+1​=QI(Kt​,It​)+(1−δ)Kt​

企业的利润函数为

Πt=Yt−RtKt−WtNt\Pi_t = Y_t -R_t K_t -W_tN_t Πt​=Yt​−Rt​Kt​−Wt​Nt​

企业的生产技术为

F(Kt,Lt;At)F(K_t,L_t;A_t) F(Kt​,Lt​;At​)

市场出清

Kt=KtNt=NtYt=Ct+ItTtax=Gt+Tt=0K_t=K_t\\ N_t= N_t\\ Y_t = C_t+ I_t\\ T^{\text{ax}}_{t} = G_t + T_t =0 Kt​=Kt​Nt​=Nt​Yt​=Ct​+It​Ttax​=Gt​+Tt​=0

技术变化 {At}t=0+∞\{A_t\}_{t=0}^{+\infty}{At​}t=0+∞​ 是一个外生的随机过程。

# A. 标准模型

令 Q(Kt,It)=It;F(Kt,Nt;At)=AtKtαNt1−α;ln⁡At+1=ρln⁡At+εtA,εtA∼N(0,σA2)Q(K_t,I_t)= I_t;F(K_t,N_t;A_t)= A_t K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha};\ln A_{t+1}= \rho \ln A_t + \varepsilon_t^A,\varepsilon_t^A \sim N(0,\sigma^2_A)Q(Kt​,It​)=It​;F(Kt​,Nt​;At​)=At​Ktα​Nt1−α​;lnAt+1​=ρlnAt​+εtA​,εtA​∼N(0,σA2​)。

（1） 求解此时居民效用最大化问题。

解：

V(Kt;Rt,Wt)=△max⁡{Ct+k,Nt+k,Kt+k+1}k=0+∞Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.Kt+1=WtNt+RtKt+Πt−Ct+(1−δ)Kt\begin{align*}V(K_t;R_t,W_t)\stackrel {\triangle}{=} \max_{\{C_{t+k},N_{t+k},K_{t+k+1}\}_{k=0}^{+\infty}}\quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad K_{t+1}= W_t N_t + R_tK_t + \Pi_t -C_t +(1-\delta)K_t \end{align*}V(Kt​;Rt​,Wt​)=△{Ct+k​,Nt+k​,Kt+k+1​}k=0+∞​max​​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Kt+1​=Wt​Nt​+Rt​Kt​+Πt​−Ct​+(1−δ)Kt​​

V(Kt;Rt,Wt)=△max⁡Ct,Nt,Kt+1u(Ct,Nt)+EtβV(Kt+1;Rt+1,Wt+1)s.t.Kt+1=WtNt+RtKt+Πt−Ct+(1−δ)Kt\begin{align*}V(K_t;R_t,W_t)\stackrel {\triangle}{=} \max_{C_t,N_t,K_{t+1}}\quad & u(C_t,N_t)+ {\mathbb E}_t \beta V(K_{t+1};R_{t+1},W_{t+1})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad K_{t+1}= W_t N_t + R_tK_t + \Pi_t -C_t +(1-\delta)K_t \end{align*}V(Kt​;Rt​,Wt​)=△Ct​,Nt​,Kt+1​max​​u(Ct​,Nt​)+Et​βV(Kt+1​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)s.t.Kt+1​=Wt​Nt​+Rt​Kt​+Πt​−Ct​+(1−δ)Kt​​

V(Kt;Rt,Wt)=max⁡Ct,Nt,Kt+1u(Ct,Nt)+EtβV(Kt+1;Rt+1,Wt+1)+λt{Kt+1+Ct−WtNt−RtKt−Πt−(1−δ)Kt}V(K_t;R_t,W_t)=\max_{C_t,N_t,K_{t+1}}\quad u(C_t,N_t)+ {\mathbb E}_t \beta V(K_{t+1};R_{t+1},W_{t+1})+\lambda_t \{K_{t+1}+C_t- W_t N_t - R_tK_t - \Pi_t -(1-\delta)K_t\} V(Kt​;Rt​,Wt​)=Ct​,Nt​,Kt+1​max​u(Ct​,Nt​)+Et​βV(Kt+1​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)+λt​{Kt+1​+Ct​−Wt​Nt​−Rt​Kt​−Πt​−(1−δ)Kt​}

FOC

∂u∂C(Ct,Nt)=△uC(Ct,Nt)=λt∂u∂N(Ct,Nt)=△uN(Ct,Nt)=−λtWt\begin{align*} & \frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_t,N_t)\stackrel {\triangle}{=} u_C(C_t,N_t)= \lambda_t\\ & \frac{\partial u}{\partial N}(C_t,N_t)\stackrel {\triangle}{=} u_N(C_t,N_t)= -\lambda_tW_t\\ \end{align*}​∂C∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=△uC​(Ct​,Nt​)=λt​∂N∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=△uN​(Ct​,Nt​)=−λt​Wt​​

对 Kt+1K_{t+1}Kt+1​

−λt=βEt∂V∂K(Kt+1;Rt+1,Wt+1)-\lambda_t = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_{t+1};R_{t+1},W_{t+1}) −λt​=βEt​∂K∂V​(Kt+1​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)

包络定理

∂V∂K(Kt;Rt,Wt)=−λt(Rt+1−δ)\frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_t;R_t,W_t)= -\lambda_t (R_t+1-\delta) ∂K∂V​(Kt​;Rt​,Wt​)=−λt​(Rt​+1−δ)

整理得

EtβuC(Ct+1,Nt+1)uC(Ct,Nt)[Rt+1+1−δ]=1(E-L){\mathbb E}_t \beta \frac{u_C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{u_C(C_t,N_t)}[R_{t+1}+1-\delta]=1\tag{E-L} Et​βuC​(Ct​,Nt​)uC​(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​[Rt+1​+1−δ]=1(E-L)

−uN(Ct,Nt)uC(Ct,Nt)=Wt(A-S)-\frac{u_N(C_t,N_t)}{u_C(C_t,N_t)}=W_t\tag{A-S} −uC​(Ct​,Nt​)uN​(Ct​,Nt​)​=Wt​(A-S)

（2） 企业利润最大化问题求解。

解：

Πt=max⁡Kt,NtYt−RtKt−WtNts.t.Yt=F(Kt,Nt;At)\begin{align*}\Pi_t = \max_{K_t,N_t} \quad & Y_t-R_tK_t-W_tN_t\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad Y_t = F(K_t,N_t;A_t)\end{align*}Πt​=Kt​,Nt​max​​Yt​−Rt​Kt​−Wt​Nt​s.t.Yt​=F(Kt​,Nt​;At​)​

解得

∂F∂K(Kt,Nt;At)=Rt(K-D)\frac{\partial F}{\partial K}(K_t,N_t;A_t)=R_t\tag{K-D} ∂K∂F​(Kt​,Nt​;At​)=Rt​(K-D)

∂F∂N(Kt,Nt;At)=Wt(A-D)\frac{\partial F}{\partial N}(K_t,N_t;A_t)= W_t\tag{A-D} ∂N∂F​(Kt​,Nt​;At​)=Wt​(A-D)

（3） 若 u(Ct,Nt)=Ct1−σ1−σ−ηLNt1+ϕ1+ϕu(C_t,N_t) = \frac{C_t^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\eta_L\frac{N_t^{1+\phi}}{1+\phi}u(Ct​,Nt​)=1−σCt1−σ​​−ηL​1+ϕNt1+ϕ​​，求解稳态的各项变量值。

解：

联立 (A-S), (A-D), (K-D),(E-L) 以及生产技术方程 (Y): Yt=AtKtαNt1−αY_t=A_t K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}Yt​=At​Ktα​Nt1−α​ 和资本积累方程 (K-A): Kt+1=It+(1−δ)KtK_{t+1}=I_t +(1-\delta)K_tKt+1​=It​+(1−δ)Kt​ 和市场出清方程 Yt=Ct+ItY_t = C_t+I_tYt​=Ct​+It​ 以及技术外生冲击，可以得到市场均衡的表述。

Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σ[Rt+1+1−δ]=1(E-L)\begin{align}& {\mathbb E}_t \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma}[R_{t+1}+1-\delta]=1\tag{E-L}\end{align} ​Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ[Rt+1​+1−δ]=1​(E-L)

Wt=ηLNtϕCtσ(A-S)\begin{align}& W_t=\eta_LN_t^\phi C_t^\sigma\tag{A-S}\end{align} ​Wt​=ηL​Ntϕ​Ctσ​​(A-S)

WtNt=(1−α)Yt(A-D)\begin{align}& W_tN_t = (1-\alpha)Y_t \tag{A-D}\\\end{align} ​Wt​Nt​=(1−α)Yt​​(A-D)

RtKt=αYt(K-D)\begin{align}& R_tK_t =\alpha Y_t \tag{K-D}\\\end{align} ​Rt​Kt​=αYt​​(K-D)

Y+t=AtKtαNt1−α(Y)\begin{align}& Y+t = A_tK_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}\tag{Y}\\\end{align} ​Y+t=At​Ktα​Nt1−α​​(Y)

Kt+1=It+(1−δ)Kt(K-A)\begin{align}& K_{t+1}= I_t + (1-\delta)K_t \tag{K-A}\\\end{align} ​Kt+1​=It​+(1−δ)Kt​​(K-A)

Yt=Ct+It(Market Clear)\begin{align}& Y_t = C_t + I_t \tag{Market Clear}\\\end{align} ​Yt​=Ct​+It​​(Market Clear)

ln⁡At+1=ρln⁡At+εtA(TFP shock)\begin{align}& \ln A_{t+1} = \rho \ln A_t + \varepsilon_t^A\tag{TFP shock}\end{align} ​lnAt+1​=ρlnAt​+εtA​​(TFP shock)

因为 EεtA=0{\mathbb E}\varepsilon_t^A = 0EεtA​=0，考虑稳态

ln⁡Aˉ=ρln⁡Aˉ⇒Aˉ=1\ln \bar A = \rho \ln\bar A\Rightarrow \bar A=1 lnAˉ=ρlnAˉ⇒Aˉ=1

则在稳态下有

Kt+1=Kt=K∗Ct+1=Ct=C∗It+1=It=I∗Nt+1=Nt=N∗Wt+1=Wt=W∗Rt+1=Rt=R∗\begin{align*} & K_{t+1}= K_t =K^*\\ & C_{t+1}= C_t = C^*\\ & I_{t+1}= I_t = I^*\\ & N_{t+ 1} = N_t = N^*\\ & W_{t+1} = W_t = W^*\\ & R_{t+1} = R_t = R^* \end{align*}​Kt+1​=Kt​=K∗Ct+1​=Ct​=C∗It+1​=It​=I∗Nt+1​=Nt​=N∗Wt+1​=Wt​=W∗Rt+1​=Rt​=R∗​

由 Euler 方程可得

β(R∗+1−δ)=1⇒R∗=1β+δ−1(1)\beta (R^*+ 1- \delta) = 1 \Rightarrow R^* = \frac1\beta + \delta -1 \tag{1} β(R∗+1−δ)=1⇒R∗=β1​+δ−1(1)

由 K-D 方程可得

R∗K∗=αY∗⇒Y∗=R∗αK∗R^* K^* = \alpha Y^* \Rightarrow Y^* = \frac{R^*}{\alpha }K^* R∗K∗=αY∗⇒Y∗=αR∗​K∗

代入 (Y) 可得

N∗=(αR)−α/(1−α)Y∗N^* = \left( \frac{\alpha}{R}\right)^{-\alpha/(1-\alpha)}Y^* N∗=(Rα​)−α/(1−α)Y∗

由 A-D 方程可得

W∗=(1−α)(αR∗)α/(1−α)W^* = (1-\alpha)\left( \frac\alpha {R^*}\right)^{\alpha/(1-\alpha)} W∗=(1−α)(R∗α​)α/(1−α)

由 K-A 方程可得

C∗=(1−αδR∗)Y∗C^* = (1-\frac{\alpha \delta}{R^*})Y^* C∗=(1−R∗αδ​)Y∗

代入 (A-S) 可得

Y∗=[(1−α)(αR∗)α(1+ϕ)/(1−α)ηL(1−αδR∗)σ]1/(ϕ+σ)Y^* = \left[\frac{(1-\alpha)\left(\frac{\alpha}{R^*} \right)^{\alpha(1+\phi)/(1-\alpha)}}{\eta_L \left( 1-\frac{\alpha \delta}{R^*}\right)^\sigma}\right]^{1/(\phi + \sigma)} Y∗=[ηL​(1−R∗αδ​)σ(1−α)(R∗α​)α(1+ϕ)/(1−α)​]1/(ϕ+σ)

最终可得

Y∗=(1−α)(αR∗)α/(1−α)[ηL(αR∗)αϕ/(1−α)(1−αδR∗)σ]1/(ϕ+σ)R∗=1β+δ−1w∗=(1−α)(αR∗)α/(1−α)N∗=(αR)α/(1−α)Y∗K∗=αY∗R∗I∗=αδR∗Y∗C∗=(1−αδR∗)Y∗\begin{align*} Y^* &= \frac{(1-\alpha)\left(\frac{\alpha}{R^*} \right)^{\alpha/(1-\alpha)}}{\left[\eta_L \left(\frac\alpha {R^*} \right)^{\alpha\phi/(1-\alpha)}\left( 1-\frac{\alpha \delta}{R^*}\right)^\sigma\right]^{1/(\phi + \sigma)}}\\ R^* &= \frac1\beta + \delta -1\\ w^* &= (1-\alpha)\left( \frac\alpha {R^*}\right)^{\alpha/(1-\alpha)}\\ N^* &= \left( \frac{\alpha}{R}\right)^{\alpha/(1-\alpha)}Y^*\\ K^* &= \frac{\alpha Y^*}{R^*}\\ I^* &= \frac{\alpha \delta}{R^*}Y^*\\ C^* &= \left(1- \frac{\alpha\delta}{R^*}\right)Y^* \end{align*}Y∗R∗w∗N∗K∗I∗C∗​=[ηL​(R∗α​)αϕ/(1−α)(1−R∗αδ​)σ]1/(ϕ+σ)(1−α)(R∗α​)α/(1−α)​=β1​+δ−1=(1−α)(R∗α​)α/(1−α)=(Rα​)α/(1−α)Y∗=R∗αY∗​=R∗αδ​Y∗=(1−R∗αδ​)Y∗​

（4） 获取稳态下的对数线性化。

解：

对 Xt+1X_{t+1}Xt+1​ 而言，x^t+1=(Xt+1−X∗)/X∗\hat x_{t+1}= (X_{t+1}-X^*)/X^*x^t+1​=(Xt+1​−X∗)/X∗，给出下列方程体系：

  1. Euler 方程

    −σ[Etx^t+1−x^t]+βR∗Etr^t+1=0-\sigma [{\mathbb E}_t \hat x_{t+1}-\hat x_t ]+ \beta R^* {\mathbb E}_t \hat r_{t+1}=0 −σ[Et​x^t+1​−x^t​]+βR∗Et​r^t+1​=0

    x^t=Etx^t+1−1σβR∗Etr^t+1\hat x_t = {\mathbb E}_t \hat x_{t+1} - \frac1\sigma \beta R^* {\mathbb E_t} \hat r_{t+1} x^t​=Et​x^t+1​−σ1​βR∗Et​r^t+1​

  2. 利率水平

    r^t+k^t=y^t\hat r_t + \hat k_t = \hat y_t r^t​+k^t​=y^​t​

  3. 生产函数

    y^t=a^t+αk^t+(1−α)n^t\hat y_t = \hat a_t + \alpha \hat k_t + (1-\alpha ) \hat n_t y^​t​=a^t​+αk^t​+(1−α)n^t​

  4. 资本积累方程

    k^t+1=(1−δ)k^t+δi^t\hat k_{t+1}= (1-\delta)\hat k_t + \delta \hat i_t k^t+1​=(1−δ)k^t​+δi^t​

  5. 市场出清条件

    αδR∗i^t+(1−αδR∗)c^t=y^t\alpha \frac{\delta}{R^*}\hat i_t + (1-\alpha\frac{\delta}{R^*})\hat c_t = \hat y_t αR∗δ​i^t​+(1−αR∗δ​)c^t​=y^​t​

  6. 劳动市场供给

    w^t=ϕn^t+σc^t\hat w_t = \phi \hat n_t + \sigma \hat c_t w^t​=ϕn^t​+σc^t​

  7. 劳动市场需求

    w^t+n^t=y^t\hat w_t + \hat n_t = \hat y_t w^t​+n^t​=y^​t​

  8. 技术冲击

    a^t+1=ρa^t+εtA\hat a_{t+1}=\rho \hat a_t + \varepsilon_t ^A a^t+1​=ρa^t​+εtA​

（5） 定义

εL≜11/ϕ+1/αεLD≜1αεLεLS≜1ϕεLρ1≜R∗ϕεLSσ+R∗α−δρ2≜R∗+1−δ+R∗1−ααεLDρ3≜1+αβR∗εLSϕρ≜1−ασβR∗εLD\begin{align*} \varepsilon_L & \triangleq \frac{1}{1/\phi + 1/\alpha}\\ \varepsilon_L^D & \triangleq \frac{1}{\alpha}\varepsilon_L\\ \varepsilon_L^S & \triangleq \frac1\phi \varepsilon_L\\ \rho_1& \triangleq \frac{R^*}{\phi}\varepsilon_L^S \sigma + \frac{R^*}{\alpha}-\delta\\ \rho_2 & \triangleq R^* + 1-\delta + R^* \frac{1-\alpha}{\alpha}\varepsilon_L^D\\ \rho_3 & \triangleq 1+ \frac{\alpha \beta R^*\varepsilon_L^S}{\phi}\\ \rho & \triangleq \frac{1-\alpha}{\sigma}\beta R^* \varepsilon_L^D \end{align*}εL​εLD​εLS​ρ1​ρ2​ρ3​ρ​≜1/ϕ+1/α1​≜α1​εL​≜ϕ1​εL​≜ϕR∗​εLS​σ+αR∗​−δ≜R∗+1−δ+R∗α1−α​εLD​≜1+ϕαβR∗εLS​​≜σ1−α​βR∗εLD​​

写出 [Etc^t+1k^t+1]\left[\begin{matrix}{\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1}\\\hat k_{t+1}\end{matrix}\right][Et​c^t+1​k^t+1​​] 的方程。

解：

资本积累

  • 由上问 5 式可得

    δi^t=R∗αy^t−(R∗α−δ)c^t\delta\hat i_t = \frac{R^*}\alpha \hat y_t - \left( \frac{R^*}{\alpha}-\delta\right)\hat c_t δi^t​=αR∗​y^​t​−(αR∗​−δ)c^t​

  • 由上问 4 式可得

    k^t+1=(1−δ)k^t+R∗αy^t−(R∗α−δ)c^t(5.1 方程)\hat k_{t+1}=(1-\delta)\hat k_t + \frac{R^*}{\alpha}\hat y_t- (\frac{R^*}{\alpha}-\delta)\hat c_t\tag{5.1 方程} k^t+1​=(1−δ)k^t​+αR∗​y^​t​−(αR∗​−δ)c^t​(5.1 方程)

劳动供需

  • 劳动需求

    w^t+n^t=y^t=a^t+αk^t+(1−α)n^t\hat w_t +\hat n_t = \hat y_t = \hat a_t + \alpha \hat k_t + (1-\alpha)\hat n_t w^t​+n^t​=y^​t​=a^t​+αk^t​+(1−α)n^t​

    αn^t=a^t+αk^t−w^t\alpha \hat n_t = \hat a_t + \alpha \hat k_t - \hat w_t αn^t​=a^t​+αk^t​−w^t​

    n^t=1αa^t+k^t−1αw^t\hat n_t = \frac1\alpha \hat a_t + \hat k_t -{\frac1\alpha} \hat w_t n^t​=α1​a^t​+k^t​−α1​w^t​

  • 劳动供给

    n^t=1ϕw^t−σϕc^t\hat n_t = \frac1\phi \hat w_t -\frac\sigma \phi \hat c_t n^t​=ϕ1​w^t​−ϕσ​c^t​

结合之后可得

1ϕw^t−1ϕσc^t=1αa^t+k^t−1αw^t\frac1\phi \hat w_t -\frac1\phi \sigma \hat c_t = \frac1\alpha \hat a_t + \hat k_t -\frac1\alpha \hat w_t ϕ1​w^t​−ϕ1​σc^t​=α1​a^t​+k^t​−α1​w^t​

w^t=1/α1/α+1/αa^t+11ϕ+1αk^t+1ϕ1ϕ+1ασc^t=εLSa^t+εLDσc^t+εLk^t\begin{align*}\hat w_t & = \frac{1/\alpha}{1/\alpha + 1/\alpha}\hat a_t + \frac{1}{\frac{1}{\phi}+ \frac1\alpha}\hat k_t + \frac{\frac1\phi}{\frac1\phi+ \frac1\alpha}\sigma \hat c_t\\ & = \varepsilon_L^S \hat a_t + \varepsilon_L^D \sigma \hat c_t + \varepsilon_L\hat k_t \end{align*}w^t​​=1/α+1/α1/α​a^t​+ϕ1​+α1​1​k^t​+ϕ1​+α1​ϕ1​​σc^t​=εLS​a^t​+εLD​σc^t​+εL​k^t​​

n^t=1ϕεLSa^t+εLSk^t−1ϕεLSσc^t\hat n_t = \frac1\phi \varepsilon_L^S \hat a_t + \varepsilon_L^S \hat k_t -\frac1\phi \varepsilon_L^S\sigma \hat c_t n^t​=ϕ1​εLS​a^t​+εLS​k^t​−ϕ1​εLS​σc^t​

y^t=εLSa^t+[(1−α)εLS+α]k^t−αϕεLSσc^t\hat y_t = \varepsilon_L^S \hat a_t + [(1-\alpha)\varepsilon_L^S+ \alpha]\hat k_t -\frac \alpha \phi \varepsilon_L^S\sigma \hat c_t y^​t​=εLS​a^t​+[(1−α)εLS​+α]k^t​−ϕα​εLS​σc^t​

r^t=εLSa^t−(1−α)εLDk^t−αϕεLSσc^t\hat r_t =\varepsilon_L^S \hat a_t -(1-\alpha)\varepsilon_L^D \hat k_t - \frac{\alpha}{\phi} \varepsilon_L^S\sigma \hat c_t r^t​=εLS​a^t​−(1−α)εLD​k^t​−ϕα​εLS​σc^t​

从而有

k^t+1=R∗αεLSa^t−(R∗ϕεLSσ+R∗α−δ)⏟ρ1c^t+[R∗+R∗1−ααεLS+1−δ]⏟ρ2k^t\hat k_{t+1} = \frac{R^*}{\alpha}\varepsilon_L^S \hat a_t -\underbrace{\left(\frac{R^*}{\phi}\varepsilon_L^S\sigma + \frac{R^*}\alpha-\delta\right)}_{\rho_1}\hat c_t + \underbrace{\left[R^*+R^*\frac{1-\alpha}\alpha \varepsilon_L^S+ 1-\delta\right]}_{\rho_2}\hat k_t k^t+1​=αR∗​εLS​a^t​−ρ1​(ϕR∗​εLS​σ+αR∗​−δ)​​c^t​+ρ2​[R∗+R∗α1−α​εLS​+1−δ]​​k^t​

c^t=Etc^t+1−1σβR∗[EtεLSa^t+1−(1−α)εLDEtk^t+1−αϕεLSσEtc^t+1]\hat c_t={\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1} -\frac1\sigma \beta R^*\left[{\mathbb E}_t \varepsilon_L^S \hat a_{t+1}- (1-\alpha)\varepsilon_L^D {\mathbb E}_t \hat k_{t+1}-\frac{\alpha}\phi \varepsilon_L^S \sigma {\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1} \right] c^t​=Et​c^t+1​−σ1​βR∗[Et​εLS​a^t+1​−(1−α)εLD​Et​k^t+1​−ϕα​εLS​σEt​c^t+1​]

c^t=(1+αβR∗εLSϕ)⏟ρ3Etc^t+1+(1−ασβR∗εLD)⏟ρ4Etk^t+1−1σβR∗εLSEta^t+1\hat c_t= \underbrace{\left(1+ \frac{\alpha\beta R^*\varepsilon_L^S}{\phi}\right)}_{\rho_3}{\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1}+ \underbrace{\left(\frac{1-\alpha}{\sigma}\beta R^* \varepsilon_L^D\right)}_{\rho_4}{\mathbb E}_t \hat k_{t+1}-\frac1\sigma \beta R^* \varepsilon_L^S {\mathbb E}_t \hat a_{t+1} c^t​=ρ3​(1+ϕαβR∗εLS​​)​​Et​c^t+1​+ρ4​(σ1−α​βR∗εLD​)​​Et​k^t+1​−σ1​βR∗εLS​Et​a^t+1​

由 a^t+1=ρa^t+εtA\hat a_{t+1}= \rho \hat a_t + \varepsilon_t^Aa^t+1​=ρa^t​+εtA​ 可得

Etc^t+1=1ρ3c^t−ρ4ρ3Etk^t+1+ρσρ3βR∗εLSa^t{\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1} = \frac1{\rho_3}\hat c_t - \frac{\rho_4}{\rho_3} {\mathbb E}_t \hat k_{t+1} + \frac{\rho }{\sigma \rho_3}\beta R^* \varepsilon_L^S \hat a_t Et​c^t+1​=ρ3​1​c^t​−ρ3​ρ4​​Et​k^t+1​+σρ3​ρ​βR∗εLS​a^t​

k^t+1=−ρc^t+ρk^t+R∗αεLSa^t\hat k_{t+1}= -\rho \hat c_t + \rho \hat k_t + \frac{R^*}\alpha \varepsilon_L^S\hat a_t k^t+1​=−ρc^t​+ρk^t​+αR∗​εLS​a^t​

令 a1,1=1ρ3a_{1,1}= \frac1{\rho_3}a1,1​=ρ3​1​，a1,2=−ρ4ρ3a_{1,2}=-\frac{\rho_4}{\rho_3}a1,2​=−ρ3​ρ4​​，a2,1=−ρ1a_{2,1}=-\rho_1a2,1​=−ρ1​，a2,2=ρ2a_{2,2}= \rho_2a2,2​=ρ2​，b1=ρσρ3βR∗b_1=\frac{\rho}{\sigma \rho_3}\beta R^*b1​=σρ3​ρ​βR∗，b2=R∗αεLSb_2= \frac{R^*}{\alpha}\varepsilon_L^Sb2​=αR∗​εLS​，可得

[Etk^t+1]=[a1,1a1,2a2,1a2,2][c^tk^t]+[b1b2]a^t\left[\begin{matrix}{\mathbb E}_t \\ \hat k_{t+1}\end{matrix}\right]=\left[\begin{matrix}a_{1,1} & a_{1,2}\\ a_{2,1} & a_{2,2}\end{matrix}\right]\left[\begin{matrix}{\hat c}_t \\ \hat k_{t}\end{matrix}\right]+\left[\begin{matrix}b_1 \\ b_2\end{matrix}\right]\hat a_t[Et​k^t+1​​]=[a1,1​a2,1​​a1,2​a2,2​​][c^t​k^t​​]+[b1​b2​​]a^t​

# B. 去增速

令 Q(Kt,It)=ItQ(K_t,I_t)= I_tQ(Kt​,It​)=It​，F(Kt,Nt;At)=AtKtαNt1−αF(K_t,N_t;A_t) = A_tK_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}F(Kt​,Nt​;At​)=At​Ktα​Nt1−α​，ln⁡At+1=ln⁡Aˉt+1+ln⁡A^t+1\ln A_{t+1}= \ln \bar A_{t+1}+\ln \hat A_{t+1}lnAt+1​=lnAˉt+1​+lnA^t+1​，其中 ln⁡Aˉt+1=gA+ln⁡Aˉt\ln \bar A_{t+1}=g_A+ \ln \bar A_tlnAˉt+1​=gA​+lnAˉt​，ln⁡A^t+1=ρln⁡A^t+εtA\ln \hat A_{t+1} = \rho \ln \hat A_t + \varepsilon_t^AlnA^t+1​=ρlnA^t​+εtA​，u(Ct,Nt)=Ct1−σ1−σ−Nt1+ϕ1+ϕu(C_t,N_t) = \frac{C_t^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\frac{N_t^{1+\phi}}{1+\phi}u(Ct​,Nt​)=1−σCt1−σ​​−1+ϕNt1+ϕ​​。

（1） 获取居民的一阶条件

（2） 求企业的一阶条件

（3） 求解市场的均衡和稳态方程

解：

经济中的市场结构如下

Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σ[Rt+1+1−δ]=1(E-L){\mathbb E}_t \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_{_t}}\right)^{-\sigma}[R_{t+1}+1-\delta]=1\tag{E-L}\\ Et​β(Ct​​Ct+1​​)−σ[Rt+1​+1−δ]=1(E-L)

Wt=ηLNtϕCtσ(A-S)W_t=\eta_LN_t^\phi C_t^\sigma\tag{A-S}\\ Wt​=ηL​Ntϕ​Ctσ​(A-S)

WtNt=(1−α)Yt(A-D)W_tN_t = (1-\alpha)Y_t \tag{A-D}\\ Wt​Nt​=(1−α)Yt​(A-D)

RtKt=αYt(K-D)R_tK_t =\alpha Y_t \tag{K-D}\\ Rt​Kt​=αYt​(K-D)

Yt=AtKtαNt1−α(Y)Y_t = A_tK_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}\tag{Y}\\ Yt​=At​Ktα​Nt1−α​(Y)

Kt+1=It+(1−δ)Kt(K-A)K_{t+1}= I_t + (1-\delta)K_t \tag{K-A}\\ Kt+1​=It​+(1−δ)Kt​(K-A)

Yt=Ct+It(Market Clear)Y_t = C_t + I_t \tag{Market Clear}\\ Yt​=Ct​+It​(Market Clear)

在平衡增长路径下，At=AˉtA_t= \bar A_tAt​=Aˉt​，增速为gAg_AgA​，因此平衡路径上 gC,gK,gY,gI,gN,gW,gRg_C,g_K,g_Y,g_I,g_N,g_W,g_RgC​,gK​,gY​,gI​,gN​,gW​,gR​ 均为常增速，不难得到 gC=gI=gK=gYg_C=g_I=g_K=g_YgC​=gI​=gK​=gY​。

从而可得

gW=ϕgN+σgC=ϕgN+σgYg_W= \phi g_N+\sigma g_C= \phi g_N + \sigma g_Y gW​=ϕgN​+σgC​=ϕgN​+σgY​

gW+gN=gY⇒(1−σ)gY=(ϕ+1)gN⇒gN=1−σ1+ϕgYg_W+g_N = g_Y\Rightarrow (1-\sigma) g_Y = (\phi+1)g_N \Rightarrow g_N= \frac{1-\sigma}{1+ \phi}g_Y gW​+gN​=gY​⇒(1−σ)gY​=(ϕ+1)gN​⇒gN​=1+ϕ1−σ​gY​

gY=gA+αgK+(1−α)gN⇒gY=11−αgA+gN=11−αgA+1−σ1+ϕgYg_Y= g_A + \alpha g_K + (1-\alpha)g_N\Rightarrow g_Y= \frac1{1-\alpha}g_A +g_N=\frac{1}{1-\alpha}g_A +\frac{1-\sigma}{1+ \phi}g_Y gY​=gA​+αgK​+(1−α)gN​⇒gY​=1−α1​gA​+gN​=1−α1​gA​+1+ϕ1−σ​gY​

σ+ϕ1+ϕgY=11−αgA\frac{\sigma + \phi}{1+ \phi}g_Y = \frac1{1-\alpha}g_A 1+ϕσ+ϕ​gY​=1−α1​gA​

gY=11−α1+ϕσ+ϕgA=gC=gI=gKg_Y= \frac1{1-\alpha} \frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma + \phi}g_A= g_C=g_I=g_K gY​=1−α1​σ+ϕ1+ϕ​gA​=gC​=gI​=gK​

gN=11−α1−σσ+ϕgAg_N= \frac1{1-\alpha}\frac{1-\sigma}{\sigma+ \phi}g_A gN​=1−α1​σ+ϕ1−σ​gA​

gW=11−αgAg_W=\frac1{1-\alpha}g_A gW​=1−α1​gA​

yt≜YtAt11−α1+ϕσ+ϕy_t\triangleq \frac{Y_t}{A_t^{\frac{1}{1-\alpha}\frac{1+\phi}{\sigma + \phi}}} yt​≜At1−α1​σ+ϕ1+ϕ​​Yt​​

ct≜CtAt11−α1+ϕσ+ϕc_t \triangleq \frac{C_t}{A_t^{\frac{1}{1-\alpha}\frac{1+\phi}{\sigma + \phi}}} ct​≜At1−α1​σ+ϕ1+ϕ​​Ct​​

it≜ItAt11−α1+ϕσ+ϕi_t \triangleq \frac{I_t}{A_t^{\frac{1}{1-\alpha}\frac{1+\phi}{\sigma + \phi}}} it​≜At1−α1​σ+ϕ1+ϕ​​It​​

kt≜KtAt11−α1+ϕσ+ϕk_t \triangleq \frac{K_t}{A_t^{\frac{1}{1-\alpha}\frac{1+\phi}{\sigma + \phi}}} kt​≜At1−α1​σ+ϕ1+ϕ​​Kt​​

wt≜WtAt11−αw_t \triangleq \frac{W_t}{A_t^{\frac{1}{1-\alpha}}} wt​≜At1−α1​​Wt​​

nt≜NtAt11−α1−σσ+ϕn_t \triangleq \frac{N_t}{A_t^{\frac{1}{1-\alpha}\frac{1-\sigma}{\sigma + \phi}}} nt​≜At1−α1​σ+ϕ1−σ​​Nt​​

gY,t=(At+1At)11−α1+ϕσ+ϕg_{Y,t}= \left( \frac{A_{t+1}}{A_t}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\alpha}\frac{1+\phi}{\sigma + \phi}} gY,t​=(At​At+1​​)1−α1​σ+ϕ1+ϕ​

可以将上述方程写为

βEt(gY,t)−σ(ct+1ct)−σ(Rt+1+1−δ)=1(1)\beta{\mathbb E}_t (g_{Y,t})^{-\sigma}\left(\frac{c_{t+1}}{c_t} \right)^{-\sigma}(R_{t+1}+1-\delta)=1\tag{1} βEt​(gY,t​)−σ(ct​ct+1​​)−σ(Rt+1​+1−δ)=1(1)

1ηLwt=ntϕctσ(2)\frac1{\eta_L} w_t = n_t^\phi c_t^\sigma\tag{2} ηL​1​wt​=ntϕ​ctσ​(2)

yt=ktαnt1−α(3)y_t = k_t^\alpha n_t^{1-\alpha}\tag{3} yt​=ktα​nt1−α​(3)

Rtkt=αyt(4)R_tk_t = \alpha y_t\tag{4} Rt​kt​=αyt​(4)

wtnt=(1−α)yt(5)w_tn_t = (1-\alpha )y_t\tag{5} wt​nt​=(1−α)yt​(5)

ct+it=yt(6)c_t+ i_t =y_t\tag{6} ct​+it​=yt​(6)

gY,tkt+1=(1−δ)kt+it(7)g_{Y,t}k_{t+1}=(1-\delta)k_t+i_t\tag{7} gY,t​kt+1​=(1−δ)kt​+it​(7)

同时有

ln⁡At+1−ln⁡At=ρ[ln⁡At−ln⁡At−1]+(1−ρ)gA+(εtA−εt−1A)\ln A_{t+1}-\ln A_t = \rho [\ln A_t-\ln A_{t-1}]+ (1-\rho)g_A+ (\varepsilon_t^A-\varepsilon_{t-1}^A) lnAt+1​−lnAt​=ρ[lnAt​−lnAt−1​]+(1−ρ)gA​+(εtA​−εt−1A​)

可得

ln⁡gY,t=ρln⁡gY,t−1+(1−ρ)gA1+ϕσ+ϕ11−α⏟gy+1+ϕσ+ϕ11−α(εt+1A−εtA)⏟εty(8)\ln g_{Y,t}=\rho \ln g_{Y,t-1} + (1-\rho)\underbrace{g_A\frac{1+\phi}{\sigma+ \phi}\frac1{1-\alpha}}_{g_y}+ \underbrace{\frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma+ \phi}\frac1{1-\alpha}(\varepsilon_{t+1}^A-\varepsilon_t^A)}_{\varepsilon_t^y}\tag{8} lngY,t​=ρlngY,t−1​+(1−ρ)gy​gA​σ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−α1​​​+εty​σ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−α1​(εt+1A​−εtA​)​​(8)

ln⁡gY,t=ρln⁡gY,t−1+(1−ρ)gy+εty\ln g_{Y,t} = \rho \ln g_{Y,t-1}+(1-\rho)g_y + \varepsilon_t^y lngY,t​=ρlngY,t−1​+(1−ρ)gy​+εty​

稳态下

(R∗+1−δ)=1βgYσ⇒R∗=1βgYσ−1+δ(R^*+1-\delta)= \frac1\beta g_Y^\sigma \Rightarrow R^* = \frac1\beta g_Y^\sigma -1+\delta (R∗+1−δ)=β1​gYσ​⇒R∗=β1​gYσ​−1+δ

R∗k=n1−αkαα⇒{k∗=αR∗y∗n∗=(R∗α)11−αk∗=(R∗α)α1−αy∗R^*k= n^{1-\alpha}k^{\alpha}\alpha \Rightarrow \begin{cases}k^* = \frac{\alpha}{R^*}y^*\\ n^* = (\frac{R^*}{\alpha})^{\frac1{1-\alpha}}k^* =(\frac{R^*}{\alpha})^{\frac\alpha{1-\alpha}} y^*\end{cases}R∗k=n1−αkαα⇒{k∗=R∗α​y∗n∗=(αR∗​)1−α1​k∗=(αR∗​)1−αα​y∗​

w∗n∗=(1−α)y∗⇒w∗=(1−α)(αR∗)α1−αw^*n^* = (1-\alpha)y^* \Rightarrow w^* = (1-\alpha)(\frac\alpha {R^*})^{\frac{\alpha}{1-\alpha}} w∗n∗=(1−α)y∗⇒w∗=(1−α)(R∗α​)1−αα​

i∗+(1−δ)k∗=gYk∗⇒i∗=(gY−1+δ)k∗=α(gY−1+δ)R∗y∗i^* + (1-\delta)k^* = g_Y k^* \Rightarrow i^*= ( g_Y -1+ \delta)k^* = \frac{\alpha(g_Y-1+\delta)}{R^*}y^* i∗+(1−δ)k∗=gY​k∗⇒i∗=(gY​−1+δ)k∗=R∗α(gY​−1+δ)​y∗

有

c∗=[1−α(gY−1+δ)R∗]y∗c^* = \left[1-\frac{\alpha (g_Y-1+\delta)}{R^*}\right]y^* c∗=[1−R∗α(gY​−1+δ)​]y∗

代入 (2) 可得

1ηLw∗=[1−α(gY−1+δ)R∗]σ(R∗α)αϕ1−α(y∗)σ+ϕ\frac1{\eta_L}w^* = [1-\frac{\alpha( g_Y-1+\delta)}{R^*}]^{\sigma}\left( \frac{R^*}{\alpha}\right)^{\frac{\alpha \phi}{1-\alpha}}\left(y^* \right)^{\sigma+\phi} ηL​1​w∗=[1−R∗α(gY​−1+δ)​]σ(αR∗​)1−ααϕ​(y∗)σ+ϕ

最终可得

y∗=[w∗ηL(1−α(gY−1+δ)R∗)σ(R∗α)αϕ1−α]1/(ϕ+σ)n∗=(k∗α)α/(1−α)y∗k∗=αy∗R∗i∗=α(gY−1+δ)R∗y∗c∗=(1−α(gY−1+δ)R∗)y∗\begin{align*} y^* &= {\left[\frac{w^*}{\eta_L (1-\frac{\alpha(g_Y-1+\delta)}{R^*})^{\sigma}\left( \frac{R^*}{\alpha}\right)^{\frac{\alpha \phi}{1-\alpha}}}\right]^{1/(\phi + \sigma)}}\\ n^* &= \left( \frac{k^*}{\alpha}\right)^{\alpha/(1-\alpha)}y^*\\ k^* &= \frac{\alpha y^*}{R^*}\\ i^* &= \frac{\alpha( g_Y-1+ \delta)}{R^*}y^*\\ c^* &= \left(1- \frac{\alpha( g_Y-1+ \delta)}{R^*}\right)y^* \end{align*}y∗n∗k∗i∗c∗​=⎣⎡​ηL​(1−R∗α(gY​−1+δ)​)σ(αR∗​)1−ααϕ​w∗​⎦⎤​1/(ϕ+σ)=(αk∗​)α/(1−α)y∗=R∗αy∗​=R∗α(gY​−1+δ)​y∗=(1−R∗α(gY​−1+δ)​)y∗​

（4） 对数线性化

解：

对 Xt+1X_{t+1}Xt+1​ 而言，x^t+1=(xt+1−x∗)/x∗\hat x_{t+1}= (x_{t+1}-x^*)/x^*x^t+1​=(xt+1​−x∗)/x∗，给出下列方程体系：

  1. Euler 方程

    −σ[Etc^t+1−c^t]−σEtg^Y,t+1+βR∗Etr^t+1=0-\sigma [{\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1}-\hat c_t ]-\sigma {\mathbb E}_t \hat g_{Y,t+1}+ \beta R^* {\mathbb E}_t \hat r_{t+1}=0 −σ[Et​c^t+1​−c^t​]−σEt​g^​Y,t+1​+βR∗Et​r^t+1​=0

    Etc^t+1=c^t−Etg^Y,t+1+1σβR∗Etr^t+1{\mathbb E}_t\hat c_{t+1} =\hat c_t - {\mathbb E}_t \hat g_{Y,t+1} + \frac1\sigma \beta R^* {\mathbb E_t} \hat r_{t+1} Et​c^t+1​=c^t​−Et​g^​Y,t+1​+σ1​βR∗Et​r^t+1​

  2. 利率水平

    r^t+k^t=y^t\hat r_t + \hat k_t = \hat y_t r^t​+k^t​=y^​t​

  3. 生产函数

    y^t=a^t+αk^t+(1−α)n^t\hat y_t = \hat a_t + \alpha \hat k_t + (1-\alpha ) \hat n_t y^​t​=a^t​+αk^t​+(1−α)n^t​

  4. 资本积累方程

    k^t+1+g^Y,t+1=(1−δ)gYk^t+(1−1−δgY)i^t\hat k_{t+1}+\hat g_{Y,t+1}= \frac{(1-\delta)}{ g_Y}\hat k_t + \left(1-\frac{1- \delta}{g_Y} \right)\hat i_t k^t+1​+g^​Y,t+1​=gY​(1−δ)​k^t​+(1−gY​1−δ​)i^t​

  5. 市场出清条件

    αδR∗i^t+(1−αδR∗)c^t=y^t\alpha \frac{\delta}{R^*}\hat i_t + (1-\alpha\frac{\delta}{R^*})\hat c_t = \hat y_t αR∗δ​i^t​+(1−αR∗δ​)c^t​=y^​t​

  6. 劳动市场供给

    w^t=ϕn^t+σc^t\hat w_t = \phi \hat n_t + \sigma \hat c_t w^t​=ϕn^t​+σc^t​

  7. 劳动市场需求

    w^t+n^t=y^t\hat w_t + \hat n_t = \hat y_t w^t​+n^t​=y^​t​

  8. 技术冲击

    g^Y,t+1=ρg^Y,t+εty\hat g_{Y,t+1}=\rho \hat g_ {Y,t} + \varepsilon_t ^y g^​Y,t+1​=ρg^​Y,t​+εty​

# C. 投资品质量变化

Q(It,Kt)=QtItQ(I_t,K_t)=Q_tI_tQ(It​,Kt​)=Qt​It​，F(At,Kt,Nt)F(A_t,K_t,N_t)F(At​,Kt​,Nt​)，其中 Qt=QˉtQ^tQ_t=\bar Q_t\hat Q_tQt​=Qˉ​t​Q^​t​，ln⁡Q^t+1=ρQln⁡Q^t+εtQ\ln \hat Q_{t+1}=\rho_Q \ln \hat Q_t + \varepsilon_t^QlnQ^​t+1​=ρQ​lnQ^​t​+εtQ​，ln⁡Qˉt=gQ⋅t\ln \bar Q_t = g_{Q}\cdot tlnQˉ​t​=gQ​⋅t,At=AˉtA^tA_t= \bar A_t\hat A_tAt​=Aˉt​A^t​，ln⁡Aˉt=gA⋅t\ln \bar A_t = g_A \cdot tlnAˉt​=gA​⋅t，ln⁡A^t+1=ρAln⁡A^t+εtA\ln \hat A_{t+1}=\rho_A \ln \hat A_t + \varepsilon_t^AlnA^t+1​=ρA​lnA^t​+εtA​，u(Ct,Nt)=Ct1−σ1−σ−ηLNt1+ϕ1+ϕu(C_t,N_t) = \frac{C_t^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\eta_L \frac{N_t^{1+\phi}}{1+\phi}u(Ct​,Nt​)=1−σCt1−σ​​−ηL​1+ϕNt1+ϕ​​。

（1） 求解居民问题的一阶条件。

解：

V(Kt;Rt,Wt,Qt)≜max⁡{Nt+k,Ct+k}k=0+∞Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct,Nt)s.t.Kt+k+1=Qt+k[Rt+kKt+k+Wt+kNt+k−Ct+k]+(1−δ)Kt+k\begin{align*} V(K_t;R_t,W_t,Q_t)\triangleq \max_{\{N_{t+k},C_{t+k}\}_{k=0}^{+\infty}} \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_t,N_t)\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad K_{t+k+1} = Q_{t+k}[R_{t+k}K_{t+k}+W_{t+k}N_{t+k}-C_{t+k}]+ (1-\delta)K_{t+k} \end{align*}V(Kt​;Rt​,Wt​,Qt​)≜{Nt+k​,Ct+k​}k=0+∞​max​​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct​,Nt​)s.t.Kt+k+1​=Qt+k​[Rt+k​Kt+k​+Wt+k​Nt+k​−Ct+k​]+(1−δ)Kt+k​​

Bellman 方程

V(Kt;Rt,Wt,Qt)=max⁡Nt,Ctu(Ct,Nt)+βEtV(Kt+1;Rt+1,Wt+1,Qt+1)s.t.Kt+1=Qt[RtKt+WtNt−Ct]+(1−δ)Kt\begin{align*} V(K_t;R_t,W_t,Q_t)= \max_{N_{t},C_t} \quad & u(C_t,N_t)+ \beta {\mathbb E}_t V(K_{t+1};R_{t+1},W_{t+1},Q_{t+1})\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad K_{t+1} = Q_{t}[R_{t}K_{t}+W_{t}N_{t}-C_{t}]+ (1-\delta)K_{t} \end{align*}V(Kt​;Rt​,Wt​,Qt​)=Nt​,Ct​max​​u(Ct​,Nt​)+βEt​V(Kt+1​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​,Qt+1​)s.t.Kt+1​=Qt​[Rt​Kt​+Wt​Nt​−Ct​]+(1−δ)Kt​​

无约束最优化

V(Kt;Rt,Wt,Qt)=max⁡Nt,Ctu(Ct,Nt)+βEtV(Kt+1;Rt+1,Wt+1,Qt+1)−λt[Kt+1−Qt(RtKt+WtNt−Ct)−(1−δ)Kt]\begin{align*}V(K_t;R_t,W_t,Q_t)= \max_{N_{t},C_t} \quad & u(C_t,N_t)+ \beta {\mathbb E}_t V(K_{t+1};R_{t+1},W_{t+1},Q_{t+1})\\ & \quad -\lambda_t [K_{t+1} - Q_{t}(R_{t}K_{t}+W_{t}N_{t}-C_{t})-(1-\delta)K_{t}]\end{align*}V(Kt​;Rt​,Wt​,Qt​)=Nt​,Ct​max​​u(Ct​,Nt​)+βEt​V(Kt+1​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​,Qt+1​)−λt​[Kt+1​−Qt​(Rt​Kt​+Wt​Nt​−Ct​)−(1−δ)Kt​]​

FOCs

∂u∂C(Ct,Nt)=λtQt\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_t,N_t)= \lambda_t Q_t ∂C∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=λt​Qt​

−∂u∂N(Ct,Nt)=λtQtWt-\frac{\partial u}{\partial N}(C_t,N_t) = \lambda_tQ_tW_t −∂N∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=λt​Qt​Wt​

λt=βEt∂V∂K(Kt+1;Qt+1;Rt+1;Wt+1)\lambda_t = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_{t+1};Q_{t+1};R_{t+1};W_{t+1}) λt​=βEt​∂K∂V​(Kt+1​;Qt+1​;Rt+1​;Wt+1​)

包络定理

∂V∂K(Kt;Wt,Qt,Rt)=λtQt[Rt+1−δQt]\frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_t;W_t,Q_t,R_t)= \lambda_t Q_t[R_t+ \frac{1-\delta}{Q_t}] ∂K∂V​(Kt​;Wt​,Qt​,Rt​)=λt​Qt​[Rt​+Qt​1−δ​]

从而可得

∂u∂C(Ct,Nt)1Qt=βEt∂u∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1)[Rt+1+1−δQt+1]\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_t,N_t)\frac1{Q_t}= \beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})[R_{t+1}+ \frac{1-\delta}{Q_{t+1}}] ∂C∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)Qt​1​=βEt​∂C∂u​(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)[Rt+1​+Qt+1​1−δ​]

Etβ∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)⏟Mt,t+1[Rt+1+1−δQt+1]Qt⏟≜Rt+1k=1(E-L){\mathbb E}_t \underbrace{\beta \frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}}_{M_{t,t+1}}\underbrace{[R_{t+1}+\frac{1-\delta}{Q_{t+1}}]Q_t}_{\triangleq R_{t+1}^k}=1\tag{E-L} Et​Mt,t+1​β∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​​​≜Rt+1k​[Rt+1​+Qt+1​1−δ​]Qt​​​=1(E-L)

劳动供给方程

−∂u/∂N(Ct,Nt)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)=Wt-\frac{\partial u/\partial N(C_t,N_t)}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}=W_t −∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂N(Ct​,Nt​)​=Wt​

（2） 企业行为的利润最大化一阶条件。

（3） 市场均衡和稳态解。

解：

市场均衡条件如下

Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σ[Rt+1Qt+(1−δ)QtQt+1]=1(E-L)\begin{align} & {\mathbb E}_t \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_{_t}}\right)^{-\sigma}[R_{t+1}Q_t+(1-\delta)\frac{Q_t}{Q_{t+1}}]=1\tag{E-L}\\\end{align}​Et​β(Ct​​Ct+1​​)−σ[Rt+1​Qt​+(1−δ)Qt+1​Qt​​]=1​(E-L)

Wt=ηLNtϕCtσ(A-S)\begin{align}& W_t=\eta_LN_t^\phi C_t^\sigma\tag{A-S}\\\end{align} ​Wt​=ηL​Ntϕ​Ctσ​​(A-S)

WtNt=(1−α)Yt(A-D)\begin{align}& W_tN_t = (1-\alpha)Y_t \tag{A-D}\\\end{align} ​Wt​Nt​=(1−α)Yt​​(A-D)

RtKt=αYt(K-D)\begin{align}& R_tK_t =\alpha Y_t \tag{K-D}\\\end{align} ​Rt​Kt​=αYt​​(K-D)

Yt=AtKtαNt1−α(Y)\begin{align}& Y_t = A_tK_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}\tag{Y}\\\end{align} ​Yt​=At​Ktα​Nt1−α​​(Y)

Kt+1=ItQt+(1−δ)Kt(K-A)\begin{align}& K_{t+1}= I_tQ_t + (1-\delta)K_t \tag{K-A}\\\end{align} ​Kt+1​=It​Qt​+(1−δ)Kt​​(K-A)

Yt=Ct+It(Market Clear)\begin{align}& Y_t = C_t + I_t \tag{Market Clear}\\ \end{align}​Yt​=Ct​+It​​(Market Clear)

在平衡增长下，gQˉ,gAˉg_{\bar Q},g_{\bar A}gQˉ​​,gAˉ​ 已知。

由 (M-C) 可得

gC=gY=gIg_C=g_Y=g_I gC​=gY​=gI​

由 (K-A) 可得

gK=gI+gQg_K=g_I+ g_Q gK​=gI​+gQ​

由 (Y) 可得

gY=gA+αgK+(1−α)gNg_Y=g_A+\alpha g_K+ (1-\alpha)g_N gY​=gA​+αgK​+(1−α)gN​

由 (A-D)，(K-D) 可得

gW+gN=gYg_W+ g_N = g_Y gW​+gN​=gY​

gR+gK=gYg_R+ g_K = g_Y gR​+gK​=gY​

由 (A-S) 可得

gW=ϕgN+σgCg_W= \phi g_N+ \sigma g_C gW​=ϕgN​+σgC​

由

gK=gY+gQˉgI=gC=gYgK+gR=gYg_K= g_Y + g_{\bar Q}\\ g_I = g_C = g_Y\\ g_K+ g_R = g_YgK​=gY​+gQˉ​​gI​=gC​=gY​gK​+gR​=gY​

可得

gR+gQˉ=0gW=gY−gNg_R+ g_{\bar Q} = 0\\ g_W = g_Y -g_NgR​+gQˉ​​=0gW​=gY​−gN​

代入 gW=ϕgN+σgCg_W= \phi g_N+ \sigma g_CgW​=ϕgN​+σgC​ 可得

gY(1−σ)=(ϕ+1)gNg_Y(1-\sigma)=(\phi + 1) g_N gY​(1−σ)=(ϕ+1)gN​

{gN=1−σ1+ϕgYgW=ϕ+σ1+ϕgY\begin{cases}g_N = \frac{1-\sigma}{1+\phi}g_Y\\ g_W = \frac{\phi + \sigma}{1+ \phi}g_Y\end{cases}{gN​=1+ϕ1−σ​gY​gW​=1+ϕϕ+σ​gY​​

代入 gY=gA+αgK+(1−α)gNg_Y=g_A+\alpha g_K+ (1-\alpha)g_NgY​=gA​+αgK​+(1−α)gN​ 可得

gY=1(1−α)ϕ+σ1+ϕ(gAˉ+αgQˉ)g_Y = \frac{1}{(1-\alpha)\frac{\phi + \sigma}{1+ \phi}}(g_{\bar A}+ \alpha g_{\bar Q}) gY​=(1−α)1+ϕϕ+σ​1​(gAˉ​+αgQˉ​​)

gY=1+ϕϕ+σ11−α(gAˉ+αgQˉ)g_Y = \frac{1+ \phi}{\phi + \sigma}\frac 1 {1-\alpha} (g_{\bar A} + \alpha g_{\bar Q}) gY​=ϕ+σ1+ϕ​1−α1​(gAˉ​+αgQˉ​​)

可得

gY=gC=gI=1+ϕϕ+σ11−α(gAˉ+αgQˉ)g_Y= g_C = g_I = \frac{1+ \phi}{\phi + \sigma}\frac 1 {1-\alpha} (g_{\bar A} + \alpha g_{\bar Q}) gY​=gC​=gI​=ϕ+σ1+ϕ​1−α1​(gAˉ​+αgQˉ​​)

gN=1−σϕ+σ11−α(gAˉ+αgQˉ)g_N = \frac{1-\sigma}{\phi + \sigma}\frac 1 {1-\alpha} (g_{\bar A} + \alpha g_{\bar Q}) gN​=ϕ+σ1−σ​1−α1​(gAˉ​+αgQˉ​​)

gW=11−α(gAˉ+αgQˉ)g_W = \frac1{1-\alpha}(g_{\bar A} + \alpha g_{\bar Q}) gW​=1−α1​(gAˉ​+αgQˉ​​)

gK=gY+gQg_K = g_Y + g_Q gK​=gY​+gQ​

gR=−gQg_R = - g_Q gR​=−gQ​

令

gY,t+1≜(At+1At)1+ϕϕ+σ11−α(Qt+1Qt)1+ϕϕ+σα1−αg_{Y,t+1} \triangleq \left(\frac{A_{t+1}}{A_t} \right)^{\frac{1+ \phi}{\phi + \sigma}\frac{1}{1-\alpha}}\left( \frac{Q_{t+1}}{Q_t}\right)^{\frac{1+\phi}{\phi + \sigma}\frac\alpha{1-\alpha}} gY,t+1​≜(At​At+1​​)ϕ+σ1+ϕ​1−α1​(Qt​Qt+1​​)ϕ+σ1+ϕ​1−αα​

gQ,t+1=Qt+1Qtg_{Q,t+1} = \frac{Q_{t+1}}{Q_t} gQ,t+1​=Qt​Qt+1​​

记

yt=YtAt1+ϕσ+ϕ11−αQt1+ϕσ+ϕα1−αy_t = \frac{Y_t}{A_t ^{\frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma+ \phi}\frac{1}{1-\alpha}}Q_t ^{\frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma + \phi}\frac{\alpha}{1-\alpha}}} yt​=Atσ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−α1​​Qtσ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−αα​​Yt​​

it=ItAt1+ϕσ+ϕ11−αQt1+ϕσ+ϕα1−αi_t = \frac{I_t}{A_t ^{\frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma+ \phi}\frac{1}{1-\alpha}}Q_t ^{\frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma + \phi}\frac{\alpha}{1-\alpha}}} it​=Atσ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−α1​​Qtσ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−αα​​It​​

ct=CtAt1+ϕσ+ϕ11−αQt1+ϕσ+ϕα1−αc_t = \frac{C_t}{A_t ^{\frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma+ \phi}\frac{1}{1-\alpha}}Q_t ^{\frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma + \phi}\frac{\alpha}{1-\alpha}}} ct​=Atσ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−α1​​Qtσ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−αα​​Ct​​

kt=KtAt1+ϕσ+ϕ11−αQt1+ϕσ+ϕα1−αQtk_t = \frac{K_t}{A_t ^{\frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma+ \phi}\frac{1}{1-\alpha}}Q_t ^{\frac{1+ \phi}{\sigma + \phi}\frac{\alpha}{1-\alpha}}Q_t} kt​=Atσ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−α1​​Qtσ+ϕ1+ϕ​1−αα​​Qt​Kt​​

wt=WtAt11−αQtα1−αw_t = \frac{W_t}{A_t^{\frac1{1-\alpha}}Q_t^{\frac\alpha {1-\alpha}}} wt​=At1−α1​​Qt1−αα​​Wt​​

nt=NtAt1−σσ+ϕ11−αQt1−σσ+ϕα1−αn_t = \frac{N_t}{A_t ^{\frac{1-\sigma}{\sigma+ \phi}\frac{1}{1-\alpha}}Q_t ^{\frac{1-\sigma}{\sigma + \phi}\frac{\alpha}{1-\alpha}}} nt​=Atσ+ϕ1−σ​1−α1​​Qtσ+ϕ1−σ​1−αα​​Nt​​

rt=RtQt−1r_t = \frac{R_t}{Q_t ^{-1}} rt​=Qt−1​Rt​​

改写上述方程

gY,t+1kt+1=it+(1−δ)kt(K-A)\begin{align} & g_{Y,t+1}k_{t+1}= i_t + (1-\delta)k_t \tag{K-A}\\\end{align}​gY,t+1​kt+1​=it​+(1−δ)kt​​(K-A)

wt=ηLntϕctσ(A-S)\begin{align}& w_t=\eta_Ln_t^\phi c_t^\sigma\tag{A-S}\\\end{align} ​wt​=ηL​ntϕ​ctσ​​(A-S)

wtnt=(1−α)yt(A-D)\begin{align}& w_tn_t = (1-\alpha)y_t \tag{A-D}\\\end{align} ​wt​nt​=(1−α)yt​​(A-D)

rtkt=αyt(K-D)\begin{align}& r_tk_t =\alpha y_t \tag{K-D}\\\end{align} ​rt​kt​=αyt​​(K-D)

yt=ct+it(M-C)\begin{align}& y_t = c_t + i_t \tag{M-C}\\\end{align} ​yt​=ct​+it​​(M-C)

Etβ(ct+1ct)−σgY,t+1−σ[rt+1+(1−δ)]gQ,t+1−1=1(E-L)\begin{align}& {\mathbb E}_t \beta \left( \frac{c_{t+1}}{c_{_t}}\right)^{-\sigma}g_{Y,t+1}^{-\sigma}[r_{t+1}+(1-\delta)]g_{Q,t+1}^{-1}=1\tag{E-L}\\\end{align} ​Et​β(ct​​ct+1​​)−σgY,t+1−σ​[rt+1​+(1−δ)]gQ,t+1−1​=1​(E-L)

yt=ktαnt1−α(Y)\begin{align}& y_t = k_t^\alpha n_t^{1-\alpha}\tag{Y}\\ \end{align}​yt​=ktα​nt1−α​​(Y)

稳态下冲击

ln⁡gY,t+1=1+ϕϕ+σ11−α[ln⁡gt+1A+αln⁡gt+1Q]\ln g_{Y,t+1}= \frac{1+ \phi}{\phi +\sigma}\frac1{1-\alpha}[\ln g_{t+1}^A + \alpha \ln g_{t+1}^Q] lngY,t+1​=ϕ+σ1+ϕ​1−α1​[lngt+1A​+αlngt+1Q​]

ln⁡gt+1A=(1−ρA)gAˉ+ρAln⁡gtA+εt+1A−εtA⏟ε~tA\ln g_{t+1}^A = (1-\rho_A)g_{\bar A}+ \rho_A \ln g_{t}^A + \underbrace{\varepsilon_{t+1}^A-\varepsilon_{t}^A}_{\tilde \varepsilon_t^A} lngt+1A​=(1−ρA​)gAˉ​+ρA​lngtA​+ε~tA​εt+1A​−εtA​​​

ln⁡gt+1Q=(1−ρQ)gQˉ+ρQln⁡gtQ+εt+1Q−εtQ⏟ε~tQ\ln g_{t+1}^Q = (1-\rho_Q)g_{\bar Q}+ \rho_Q \ln g_{t}^Q + \underbrace{\varepsilon_{t+1}^Q-\varepsilon_{t}^Q}_{\tilde \varepsilon_t^Q} lngt+1Q​=(1−ρQ​)gQˉ​​+ρQ​lngtQ​+ε~tQ​εt+1Q​−εtQ​​​

在稳态下，(E-L) 变成

R∗=1βgQˉgYˉ−1+δR^* = \frac1\beta g_{\bar Q} g_{\bar Y} -1+\delta R∗=β1​gQˉ​​gYˉ​−1+δ

其他与 B 中相同。

（4） 对数线性化方程

g^Y,t+1+k^t+1=(1−1−δgYˉ)i^t+1−δgYk^t(1)\hat g_{Y,t+1}+ \hat k_{t+1}= \left( 1-\frac{1-\delta}{g_{\bar Y}}\right)\hat i_t + \frac{1-\delta}{g_Y}\hat k_t\tag{1} g^​Y,t+1​+k^t+1​=(1−gYˉ​1−δ​)i^t​+gY​1−δ​k^t​(1)

w^t=σc^t+ϕn^t(2)\hat w_t = \sigma \hat c_t + \phi \hat n_t \tag2 w^t​=σc^t​+ϕn^t​(2)

w^t+n^t=y^t(3)\hat w_t + \hat n_t = \hat y_t \tag3 w^t​+n^t​=y^​t​(3)

r^t+k^t=y^t(4)\hat r_t + \hat k_t = \hat y_t\tag4 r^t​+k^t​=y^​t​(4)

c∗y∗c^t+i∗y∗i^t=y^t(5)\frac{c^*}{y^*} \hat c_t + \frac{i^*}{y^*} \hat i_t = \hat y_t \tag5 y∗c∗​c^t​+y∗i∗​i^t​=y^​t​(5)

−σEtc^t+1−σEtg^Y,t+1+βR∗Etr^t+1−Etg^Q,t+1=0(6)-\sigma {\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1}-\sigma {\mathbb E}_t \hat g_{Y,t+1} + \beta R^* {\mathbb E}_t \hat r_{t+1}-{\mathbb E}_t \hat g_{Q,t+1}=0\tag6 −σEt​c^t+1​−σEt​g^​Y,t+1​+βR∗Et​r^t+1​−Et​g^​Q,t+1​=0(6)

αk^t+(1−α)n^t=y^t(7)\alpha \hat k_t + (1-\alpha)\hat n_t = \hat y_t\tag{7} αk^t​+(1−α)n^t​=y^​t​(7)

# D. 调整成本计算

将 A 中 Q(It,Kt)=ItQ(I_t,K_t)= I_tQ(It​,Kt​)=It​ 改为 Q(It,Kt)=It[1−ϕ2(ItIt−1−1)2]Q(I_t,K_t)= I_t [1-\frac{\phi}2\left(\frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}-1\right)^2]Q(It​,Kt​)=It​[1−2ϕ​(It−1​It​​−1)2]，其余保持不变。

（1） 求居民的一阶条件。

解：

V(Kt,It−1;Rt,Wt)≜max⁡Et∑k=0∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.Kt+1=It[1−ϕ2(ItIt−1−1)2]+(1−δ)KtCt+It=RtKt+WtNt\begin{align*} V(K_t,I_{t-1};R_t,W_t) \triangleq \max \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad K_{t+1} = I_t \left[1-\frac{\phi}{2}\left(\frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}-1 \right)^2\right]+ (1-\delta)K_t\\ & \quad \quad \; C_t+ I_t = R_t K_t + W_t N_t \end{align*}V(Kt​,It−1​;Rt​,Wt​)≜max​Et​k=0∑∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Kt+1​=It​[1−2ϕ​(It−1​It​​−1)2]+(1−δ)Kt​Ct​+It​=Rt​Kt​+Wt​Nt​​

Bellman 方程

V(Kt,It−1;Rt,Wt)≜max⁡u(Ct,Nt)+βEtV(Kt+1,It;Rt+1,Wt+1)s.t.Kt+1=It[1−ϕ2(ItIt−1−1)2]+(1−δ)KtCt+It=RtKt+WtNt\begin{align*} V(K_t,I_{t-1};R_t,W_t) \triangleq \max \quad & u(C_{t},N_{t}) + \beta{\mathbb E}_t V(K_{t+1},I_{t};R_{t+1},W_{t+1})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad K_{t+1} = I_t \left[1-\frac{\phi}{2}\left(\frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}-1 \right)^2\right]+ (1-\delta)K_t\\ & \quad \quad \; C_t+ I_t = R_t K_t + W_t N_t \end{align*}V(Kt​,It−1​;Rt​,Wt​)≜max​u(Ct​,Nt​)+βEt​V(Kt+1​,It​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)s.t.Kt+1​=It​[1−2ϕ​(It−1​It​​−1)2]+(1−δ)Kt​Ct​+It​=Rt​Kt​+Wt​Nt​​

无约束最优化

V(Kt,It−1;Rt,Wt)≜max⁡Ct,Nt,It,Kt+1,λtK,λtBu(Ct,Nt)+βEtV(Kt+1,It;Rt+1,Wt+1)−λtK{Kt+1−It[1−ϕ2(ItIt−1−1)2]−(1−δ)Kt}−λtB[Ct+It−RtKt−WtNt]\begin{align*} V(K_t,I_{t-1};R_t,W_t) \triangleq \max_{C_t,N_t,I_t,K_{t+1},\lambda_t^K,\lambda_t^B} \quad & u(C_{t},N_{t}) + \beta{\mathbb E}_t V(K_{t+1},I_{t};R_{t+1},W_{t+1})\\ & -\lambda_t^K\left\{ \quad K_{t+1} - I_t \left[1-\frac{\phi}{2}\left(\frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}-1 \right)^2\right]- (1-\delta)K_t\right\}\\ & -\lambda_t^B[ C_t+ I_t - R_t K_t -W_t N_t] \end{align*}V(Kt​,It−1​;Rt​,Wt​)≜Ct​,Nt​,It​,Kt+1​,λtK​,λtB​max​​u(Ct​,Nt​)+βEt​V(Kt+1​,It​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)−λtK​{Kt+1​−It​[1−2ϕ​(It−1​It​​−1)2]−(1−δ)Kt​}−λtB​[Ct​+It​−Rt​Kt​−Wt​Nt​]​

FOCs

∂u∂C(Ct,Nt)=λtB(1)\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_t,N_t)=\lambda_t^B\tag{1} ∂C∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=λtB​(1)

−∂u∂N(Ct,Nt)=λtBWt(2)-\frac{\partial u}{\partial N}(C_t,N_t)=\lambda_t^B W_t\tag2 −∂N∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=λtB​Wt​(2)

λtK=βEt∂V∂K(Kt+1,It+1;Rt+1,Wt+1)(3)\lambda_t^K = \beta{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_{t+1},I_{t+1};R_{t+1},W_{t+1})\tag3 λtK​=βEt​∂K∂V​(Kt+1​,It+1​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)(3)

λtB=λtK[1−ϕ2(ItIt−1−1)2−ItIt−1(ItIt−1−1)ϕ+βEt∂V∂I(Kt+1,It+1;Rt+1,Wt+1)](4)\lambda_t^B = \lambda_t^K \left[1-\frac\phi2\left(\frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}-1\right)^2-\frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}\left(\frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}-1\right)\phi+ \beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial I}(K_{t+1},I_{t+1};R_{t+1},W_{t+1})\right]\tag4 λtB​=λtK​[1−2ϕ​(It−1​It​​−1)2−It−1​It​​(It−1​It​​−1)ϕ+βEt​∂I∂V​(Kt+1​,It+1​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)](4)

λtD\lambda_t^DλtD​ 为边际效用，而 λtK\lambda_t^KλtK​ 为资本乘子，有差异为调整成本。

包络定理

∂V∂K(Kt,It−1;Rt,Wt)=λtk(1−δ)+λtBRt\frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_t,I_{t-1};R_{t},W_t)= \lambda_t^k(1-\delta)+ \lambda_t^BR_t ∂K∂V​(Kt​,It−1​;Rt​,Wt​)=λtk​(1−δ)+λtB​Rt​

∂V∂I(Kt,It−1;Rt,Wt)=λtK(ItIt−1)(ItIt−1−1)ϕ1It−1It\frac{\partial V}{\partial I}(K_t,I_{t-1};R_{t},W_t)=\lambda_t^K\left( \frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}\right)\left( \frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}-1\right)\phi \frac1{I_{t-1}}I_t ∂I∂V​(Kt​,It−1​;Rt​,Wt​)=λtK​(It−1​It​​)(It−1​It​​−1)ϕIt−1​1​It​

代入 (3) 有

βEtλt+1BλtB[Rt+1+(1−δ)λt+1Kλt+1B]λtBλtK=1\beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\lambda_{t+1}^B}{\lambda_t^B}\left[R_{t+1}+ (1-\delta)\frac{\lambda_{t+1}^K}{\lambda_{t+1}^B}\right]\frac{\lambda_t^B}{\lambda_t^K}=1 βEt​λtB​λt+1B​​[Rt+1​+(1−δ)λt+1B​λt+1K​​]λtK​λtB​​=1

令 qt=λtKλtBq_t = \frac{\lambda_t^K}{\lambda_t^B}qt​=λtB​λtK​​ 表示因资本调成成本导致的损失，可得

Etβ∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)⏟Mt,t+1[Rt+1+(1−δ)qt+1]=qt(E-L){\mathbb E}_t \underbrace{\beta\frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}}_{M_{t,t+1}}[R_{t+1}+ (1-\delta)q_{t+1}]= q_t\tag{E-L} Et​Mt,t+1​β∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​​​[Rt+1​+(1−δ)qt+1​]=qt​(E-L)

−∂u/∂N(Ct,Nt)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)=Wt(A-S)-\frac{\partial u/\partial N(C_t,N_t)}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}=W_t\tag{A-S} −∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂N(Ct​,Nt​)​=Wt​(A-S)

对 ItI_tIt​ 的一阶方程为

[1−ϕ2(ItIt−1−1)2−ϕItIt−1(ItIt−1−1)]×λtKλtB+βEt∂V∂I(kt+1,It;Rt+1,Wt+1)λtB=1\left[1-\frac{\phi}{2}\left(\frac{I_{t}}{I_{t-1}}-1\right)^{2}-\phi \frac{I_{t}}{I_{t-1}}\left(\frac{I_{t}}{I_{t-1}}-1\right)\right] \times \frac{\lambda_{t}^{K}}{\lambda_{t}^{B}}+\beta \mathbb{E}_{t} \frac{\frac{\partial V}{\partial I}\left(k_{t+1}, I_{t} ; R_{t+1},W_{t +1}\right)}{\lambda_t^B}=1 [1−2ϕ​(It−1​It​​−1)2−ϕIt−1​It​​(It−1​It​​−1)]×λtB​λtK​​+βEt​λtB​∂I∂V​(kt+1​,It​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)​=1

由对 ItI_tIt​ 的包络定理，延后一期可获得

∂V∂I(Kt+1,It;Rt+1,Wt+1)=ϕ(It+1It)2(It+1It−1)λt+1K\frac{\partial V}{\partial I}(K_{t+1},I_t;R_{t+1},W_{t+1})=\phi \left( \frac{I_{t+1}}{I_t}\right)^2\left( \frac{I_{t+1}}{I_t}-1\right)\lambda_{t+1}^K ∂I∂V​(Kt+1​,It​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)=ϕ(It​It+1​​)2(It​It+1​​−1)λt+1K​

因为 λt+1K=λt+1Kλt+1Bλt+1B\lambda_{t+1}^K=\frac{\lambda_{t+1}^K}{\lambda_{t+1}^B}\lambda_{t+1}^Bλt+1K​=λt+1B​λt+1K​​λt+1B​，代入后可得 qtq_tqt​ 的运动方程

1=qt[1−ϕ2(ItIt+1−1)2−ϕItIt+1(ItIt+1−1)]+EtMt,t+1qt+1ϕ(It+1It−1)(It+1It)21= q_t\left[1-\frac{\phi}2 \left( \frac{I_t}{I_{t+1}}-1\right)^2-\phi\frac{I_t}{I_{t+1}}\left( \frac{I_t}{I_{t+1}}-1\right)\right]+ {\mathbb E}_t M_{t,t+1}q_{t+1}\phi \left( \frac{I_{t+1}}{I_t}-1\right)\left( \frac{I_{t+1}}{I_t}\right)^2 1=qt​[1−2ϕ​(It+1​It​​−1)2−ϕIt+1​It​​(It+1​It​​−1)]+Et​Mt,t+1​qt+1​ϕ(It​It+1​​−1)(It​It+1​​)2

（2） 企业行为

（3） 稳态值

因稳态下 qt≡qt+1=1q_t\equiv q_{t+1} =1qt​≡qt+1​=1，从而均与 A 中相同，仅变动 Euler 方程同时增加上述动态方程。

（4） 对数线性化

1=qt−ϕ2qt(ItIt−1)2+ϕqtItIt−1−ϕqt(ItIt+1)2+ϕqtItIt−1+Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σqt+1ϕ(It+1It)3−Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σqt+1ϕ(It+1It)21= q_t -\frac\phi2 q_t \left(\frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}} \right)^2+ \phi q_t \frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}-\phi q_t \left( \frac{I_t}{I_{t+1}}\right)^2 + \phi q_t \frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}+{\mathbb E}_t \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma}q_{t+1}\phi \left( \frac{I_{t+1}}{I_t}\right)^3 - {\mathbb E}_t \beta\left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma}q_{t+1}\phi \left( \frac{I_{t+1}}{I_t}\right)^2 1=qt​−2ϕ​qt​(It−1​It​​)2+ϕqt​It−1​It​​−ϕqt​(It+1​It​​)2+ϕqt​It−1​It​​+Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σqt+1​ϕ(It​It+1​​)3−Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σqt+1​ϕ(It​It+1​​)2

稳态下

It+1It=ItIt−1=1\frac{I_{t+1}}{I_t}= \frac{I_t}{I_{t-1}}=1 It​It+1​​=It−1​It​​=1

Ct+1Ct=1\frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}=1 Ct​Ct+1​​=1

对数线性化之后有

0=q^t−3ϕ2q^t−3ϕ[i^t−i^t−1]+2ϕq^t+2ϕ(i^t−i^t−1)+βϕ[−σEtc^t+1+σc^t+Etq^t+1+3Eti^t−1−3i^t]−βϕ[−σEtc^t+1+σc^t+Etq^t+1+2Eti^t+1−2i^t]0= \hat q_t - \frac{3\phi}{2}\hat q_t - 3 \phi [\hat i_t - \hat i _{t-1}]+ 2\phi \hat q_t + 2\phi (\hat i_t - \hat i_{t-1}) + \beta \phi [-\sigma {\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1} + \sigma \hat c_t + {\mathbb E}_t \hat q_{t+1}+ 3 {\mathbb E}_t \hat i_{t-1}- 3\hat i_t ]- \beta \phi [-\sigma {\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1}+ \sigma \hat c_t + {\mathbb E}_t \hat q_{t+1}+ 2{\mathbb E}_t \hat i_{t+1}-2\hat i_t] 0=q^​t​−23ϕ​q^​t​−3ϕ[i^t​−i^t−1​]+2ϕq^​t​+2ϕ(i^t​−i^t−1​)+βϕ[−σEt​c^t+1​+σc^t​+Et​q^​t+1​+3Et​i^t−1​−3i^t​]−βϕ[−σEt​c^t+1​+σc^t​+Et​q^​t+1​+2Et​i^t+1​−2i^t​]

整理得

0=(1+ϕ2)q^t−ϕ(i^t−i^t−1)+βϕEti^t+1−βϕi^t0= \left( 1+ \frac{\phi}{2}\right)\hat q_t - \phi (\hat i_t - \hat i_{t-1}) + \beta \phi {\mathbb E}_t \hat i_{t+1}-\beta \phi \hat i_{t} 0=(1+2ϕ​)q^​t​−ϕ(i^t​−i^t−1​)+βϕEt​i^t+1​−βϕi^t​

从而有调整成本比价 qtq_tqt​ 的变化方程

(1+ϕ2)q^t=ϕ[(i^t−i^t+1)−β(Eti^t+1−i^t)]\left( 1+ \frac\phi2\right)\hat q_t = \phi \left[(\hat i_t -\hat i_{t+1})-\beta ({\mathbb E}_t \hat i_{t+1}-\hat i _t)\right] (1+2ϕ​)q^​t​=ϕ[(i^t​−i^t+1​)−β(Et​i^t+1​−i^t​)]

之后 Euler 方程变为

−σ(Etc^t+1−c^t)+βR∗Etr^t+1+β(1−δ)Etq^q+1=q^t-\sigma ({\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1} -\hat c_t )+ \beta R^* {\mathbb E}_t \hat r_{t+1}+ \beta (1-\delta){\mathbb E}_t \hat q_{q+1} = \hat q_t −σ(Et​c^t+1​−c^t​)+βR∗Et​r^t+1​+β(1−δ)Et​q^​q+1​=q^​t​

其余维持不变。

# E. 居民消费习惯问题

将 u(Ct,Nt)u(C_t,N_t)u(Ct​,Nt​) 换为 (Ct−rCt−1)1−σ1−σ−ηLNt1+ϕ1+ϕ\frac{(C_t-rC_{t-1})^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\eta_L \frac{N_t ^{1+ \phi}}{1+ \phi}1−σ(Ct​−rCt−1​)1−σ​−ηL​1+ϕNt1+ϕ​​，其余均如同 A 中所示。

（1） 居民问题。

解：

V(Kt,Ct−1;Rt,Wt)≜max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Ct+k−1,Nt+k)s.t.Kt+1=RtKt+(1−δ)Kt+WtNt−Ct\begin{align*}V(K_t,C_{t-1};R_t,W_t) \triangleq \max \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta ^k u(C_{t+k},C_{t+k-1},N_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad K_{t+1}= R_t K_t + (1-\delta)K_t + W_tN_t -C_t \end{align*}V(Kt​,Ct−1​;Rt​,Wt​)≜max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Ct+k−1​,Nt+k​)s.t.Kt+1​=Rt​Kt​+(1−δ)Kt​+Wt​Nt​−Ct​​

Bellman 方程

V(Kt,Ct−1;Rt,Wt)≜max⁡u(Ct,Ct−1,Nt)+βEtV(Kt+1,Ct;Rt+1,Wt+1)s.t.Kt+1=RtKt+(1−δ)Kt+WtNt−Ct\begin{align*}V(K_t,C_{t-1};R_t,W_t) \triangleq \max \quad & u(C_{t},C_{t-1},N_{t})+ \beta{\mathbb E}_t V(K_{t+1},C_{t};R_{t+1},W_{t+1})\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad K_{t+1}= R_t K_t + (1-\delta)K_t + W_tN_t -C_t \end{align*}V(Kt​,Ct−1​;Rt​,Wt​)≜max​u(Ct​,Ct−1​,Nt​)+βEt​V(Kt+1​,Ct​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)s.t.Kt+1​=Rt​Kt​+(1−δ)Kt​+Wt​Nt​−Ct​​

无约束最大化问题

V(Kt,Ct−1;Rt,Wt)≜max⁡u(Ct,Ct−1,Nt)+βEtV(Kt+1,Ct;Rt+1,Wt+1)−λt[Kt+1−RtKt−(1−δ)Kt−WtNt+Ct]\begin{align*}V(K_t,C_{t-1};R_t,W_t) \triangleq \max \quad & u(C_{t},C_{t-1},N_{t})+ \beta{\mathbb E}_t V(K_{t+1},C_{t};R_{t+1},W_{t+1})\\ & \quad-\lambda_t[ K_{t+1}- R_t K_t - (1-\delta)K_t - W_tN_t +C_t] \end{align*}V(Kt​,Ct−1​;Rt​,Wt​)≜max​u(Ct​,Ct−1​,Nt​)+βEt​V(Kt+1​,Ct​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)−λt​[Kt+1​−Rt​Kt​−(1−δ)Kt​−Wt​Nt​+Ct​]​

FOCs

∂u∂Ct(Ct,Ct−1,Nt)+βEt∂V∂Ct(Kt+1,Ct;Rt+1,Wt+1)=λt\frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}(C_t,C_{t-1},N_t)+ \beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial C_t}(K_{t+1},C_t;R_{t+1},W_{t+1}) = \lambda_t ∂Ct​∂u​(Ct​,Ct−1​,Nt​)+βEt​∂Ct​∂V​(Kt+1​,Ct​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)=λt​

−∂u∂N(Ct,Ct−1;Nt)=λtWt- \frac{\partial u}{\partial N}(C_t,C_{t-1};N_t) = \lambda_t W_t −∂N∂u​(Ct​,Ct−1​;Nt​)=λt​Wt​

λt=βEt∂V∂K(Kt+1,Ct;Rt+1,Wt+1)\lambda_t = \beta{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_{t+1},C_t;R_{t+1},W_{t+1}) λt​=βEt​∂K∂V​(Kt+1​,Ct​;Rt+1​,Wt+1​)

包络定理

∂V∂Ct−1(Kt,Ct−1;Rt,Wt)=∂u∂Ct−1(Ct,Ct−1,Nt)\frac{\partial V}{\partial C_{t-1}}(K_t,C_{t-1};R_t,W_t) = \frac{\partial u}{\partial C_{t-1}}(C_t,C_{t-1},N_t) ∂Ct−1​∂V​(Kt​,Ct−1​;Rt​,Wt​)=∂Ct−1​∂u​(Ct​,Ct−1​,Nt​)

∂V∂Kt(Kt,Ct−1;Rt,Wt)=λt[Rt+(1−δ)]\frac{\partial V}{\partial K_t}(K_t,C_{t-1};R_t,W_t) = \lambda_t [R_t+ (1-\delta)] ∂Kt​∂V​(Kt​,Ct−1​;Rt​,Wt​)=λt​[Rt​+(1−δ)]

上述方程可以简化为

λt=∂u∂Ctu(Ct,Ct−1,Nt)+βEt∂u∂Ct(Ct+1,Ct,Nt+1)\begin{align} \lambda_t = \frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}u(C_t,C_{t-1},N_t)+ \beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial u}{\partial C_t}(C_{t+1},C_t,N_{t+1})\\\end{align}λt​=∂Ct​∂u​u(Ct​,Ct−1​,Nt​)+βEt​∂Ct​∂u​(Ct+1​,Ct​,Nt+1​)​​

−∂u∂Nt(Ct,Ct−1,Nt)=λtWt(2)\begin{align}-\frac{\partial u}{\partial N_t}(C_t,C_{t-1},N_t)= \lambda_t W_t\tag{2}\\\end{align} −∂Nt​∂u​(Ct​,Ct−1​,Nt​)=λt​Wt​​(2)

λt=βEtλt+1(Rt+1+1−δ)(3)\begin{align}\lambda_t = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \lambda_{t+1}(R_{t+1}+ 1-\delta)\tag{3} \end{align}λt​=βEt​λt+1​(Rt+1​+1−δ)​(3)

（2）

同之前

（3）

略

（4）

略

# F. 企业持有资本，居民持债向企业投资以及中央计划者问题

（1） 中央计划者问题

V(Kt,At)≜max⁡{Ct+k,Nt+k}k=0+∞E∑k=0∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.Kt+1=AtKtαNt1−α+(1−δ)Kt−Ct\begin{align*} V(K_t,A_t)\triangleq \max_{\{C_{t+k},N_{t+k}\}_{k=0}^{+\infty}} \quad & {\mathbb E} \sum_{k=0}^{\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad K_{t+1}= A_t K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha} + (1-\delta)K_t-C_t \end{align*}V(Kt​,At​)≜{Ct+k​,Nt+k​}k=0+∞​max​​Ek=0∑∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Kt+1​=At​Ktα​Nt1−α​+(1−δ)Kt​−Ct​​

说明解与 A 相同，并分析福利经济学第一二定理。

（2） 企业持有资本、居民用债券向企业注资

居民行为

max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.Ct+k+Bt+k+1≤Rt+kβBt+k+Wt+kNt+k\begin{align*}\max \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad C_{t+k}+ B_{t+k+1} \leq R_{t+k}^\beta B_{t+k}+ W_{t+k}N_{t+k} \end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Ct+k​+Bt+k+1​≤Rt+kβ​Bt+k​+Wt+k​Nt+k​​

令 Mt,t+1=βuC(Ct+1,Nt+1)uC(Ct,Nt)M_{t,t+1}=\beta \frac{u_C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{u_C(C_t,N_t)}Mt,t+1​=βuC​(Ct​,Nt​)uC​(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​，Mt,t+k=βk∂u/∂C(Ct+k,Nt+k)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)M_{t,t+k}= \beta^k \frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}Mt,t+k​=βk∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂C(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)​ 为贴现因子。

企业行为

max⁡Et∑k=0+∞Mt,t+k[Yt+k−Wt+kNt+k+Dt+k+1−Rt+kβDt+k−It]s.t.Kt+1=(1−δ)Kt+ItYt=AtKtαNt1−α\begin{align*}\max \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} M_{t,t+k} [Y_{t+k}-W_{t+k}N_{t+k}+D_{t+k+1}-R_{t+k}^\beta D_{t+k}-I_t]\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad K_{t+1} = (1-\delta)K_t + I_t\\ & \quad \; \quad Y_t = A_t K_t ^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}\end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑+∞​Mt,t+k​[Yt+k​−Wt+k​Nt+k​+Dt+k+1​−Rt+kβ​Dt+k​−It​]s.t.Kt+1​=(1−δ)Kt​+It​Yt​=At​Ktα​Nt1−α​​

虚拟资本市场出清

Bt=DtB_t = D_t Bt​=Dt​

实物产品市场出清

Yt=Ct+ItY_t= C_t + I_t Yt​=Ct​+It​

说明上述过程的解与 A 相同。

# G. 需求冲击

考虑一个中央计划者问题

V(Kt,ξt)=max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βkξt+ku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.Kt+1=KtαNt1−α−Ct+(1−δ)Kt\begin{align*}V(K_t,\xi_t ) = \max \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+ \infty} \beta^k \xi_{t+k} u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ &\text{s.t.}\quad K_{t+1} = K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}-C_t + (1-\delta)K_t\end{align*}V(Kt​,ξt​)=max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βkξt+k​u(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Kt+1​=Ktα​Nt1−α​−Ct​+(1−δ)Kt​​

ln⁡ξt+1=ρDln⁡ξt+εtD,εtD∼N(0,σD2)\ln \xi_{t+1}=\rho_D \ln \xi_t + \varepsilon_t^D,\varepsilon_t^D \sim N(0,\sigma_D^2) lnξt+1​=ρD​lnξt​+εtD​,εtD​∼N(0,σD2​)

（1） 解 Euler 方程。

解：

V(Kt,ξt)=max⁡Ct,Ntu(Ct,Nt)ξt+βEtV(Kt+1,ξt+1)s.t.Kt+1=KtαNt1−α+(1−δ)Kt−Ct\begin{align*} V(K_t,\xi_t)= \max_{C_t,N_t} \quad & u(C_t,N_t)\xi_t + \beta{\mathbb E}_t V(K_{t+1},\xi_{t+1})\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad K_{t+1}= K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}+ (1-\delta)K_t -C_t \end{align*}V(Kt​,ξt​)=Ct​,Nt​max​​u(Ct​,Nt​)ξt​+βEt​V(Kt+1​,ξt+1​)s.t.Kt+1​=Ktα​Nt1−α​+(1−δ)Kt​−Ct​​

V(Kt,ξt)=max⁡Ct,Ntu(Ct,Nt)ξt+βEtV(Kt+1,ξt+1)−λt[Kt+1−KtαNt1−α−(1−δ)Kt+Ct]\begin{align*} V(K_t,\xi_t)= \max_{C_t,N_t} \quad & u(C_t,N_t)\xi_t + \beta{\mathbb E}_t V(K_{t+1},\xi_{t+1})\\ & \quad -\lambda_t [K_{t+1}- K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}- (1-\delta)K_t +C_t] \end{align*}V(Kt​,ξt​)=Ct​,Nt​max​​u(Ct​,Nt​)ξt​+βEt​V(Kt+1​,ξt+1​)−λt​[Kt+1​−Ktα​Nt1−α​−(1−δ)Kt​+Ct​]​

FOCs

ξt∂u∂C(Ct,Nt)=λt\xi_t \frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_t,N_t)=\lambda_t ξt​∂C∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=λt​

−ξt∂u∂N(Ct,Nt)=λt∂(KtαNt1−α)∂N-\xi_t \frac{\partial u}{\partial N}(C_t,N_t) = \lambda_t \frac{\partial (K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}) }{\partial N} −ξt​∂N∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=λt​∂N∂(Ktα​Nt1−α​)​

λt=βEt∂V∂K(Kt,ξt+1)\lambda_t = \beta{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_{t},\xi_{t+1}) λt​=βEt​∂K∂V​(Kt​,ξt+1​)

包络定理

∂V∂K(Kt,ξt)=λt[∂∂K(Kt+1αNt1−α)+1−δ]\frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_t,\xi_t) = \lambda_t \left[\frac{\partial }{\partial K}(K_{t+1}^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha})+1-\delta\right] ∂K∂V​(Kt​,ξt​)=λt​[∂K∂​(Kt+1α​Nt1−α​)+1−δ]

可得 Euler 方程

Etβξt+1ξt∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)⏟≜Mt,t+1[∂∂K(Kt+1αNt1−α)+1−δ]=1(1){\mathbb E}_t \underbrace{\beta \frac{\xi_{t+1}}{\xi_t}\frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}}_{\triangleq M_{t,t+1}}\left[\frac{\partial }{\partial K}(K_{t+1}^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha})+1-\delta\right]=1\tag{1} Et​≜Mt,t+1​βξt​ξt+1​​∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​​​[∂K∂​(Kt+1α​Nt1−α​)+1−δ]=1(1)

劳动供给方程

−∂u/∂N(Ct,Nt)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)=∂∂N(Kt,Nt1−α)(2)-\frac{\partial u/\partial N(C_t,N_t) }{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}=\frac{\partial }{\partial N}(K_t,N_t^{1-\alpha})\tag2 −∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂N(Ct​,Nt​)​=∂N∂​(Kt​,Nt1−α​)(2)

（2） 解均衡。

解：

配合

Kt+1=KtαNt1−α+(1−δ)Kt−Ct(3)K_{t+1}=K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha} + (1-\delta)K_t -C_t\tag3 Kt+1​=Ktα​Nt1−α​+(1−δ)Kt​−Ct​(3)

获得方程。

由于

ξt+1=ρDξt+εtD,εtD∼N(D,σD2)\xi_{t+1}=\rho_D \xi_t + \varepsilon_t^D,\varepsilon_t^D \sim N(D,\sigma_D^2) ξt+1​=ρD​ξt​+εtD​,εtD​∼N(D,σD2​)

所以 ξ\xiξ 在稳态下为 1，则其解与 A 相同。

（3） 对数线性化。

解：

令 R∗=1β−1+δR^*=\frac1\beta -1+\deltaR∗=β1​−1+δ

−σ(Etc^t+1−ct)+(Etξ^t+1−ξ^t)+βR∗(1−α)Et(n^t+1−k^t+1)=0(1)-\sigma ({\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1}-c_t)+ ({\mathbb E}_t \hat \xi_{t+1}-\hat \xi_t )+ \beta R^* (1-\alpha) {\mathbb E}_t (\hat n_{t+1}-\hat k_{t+1})=0\tag{1} −σ(Et​c^t+1​−ct​)+(Et​ξ^​t+1​−ξ^​t​)+βR∗(1−α)Et​(n^t+1​−k^t+1​)=0(1)

α(k^t−n^t)=σc^t+ϕn^t(2)\alpha (\hat k_t -\hat n_t ) = \sigma \hat c_t + \phi \hat n_t\tag{2} α(k^t​−n^t​)=σc^t​+ϕn^t​(2)

k^t+1=1βk^t+(1−α)Y∗K∗n^t−C∗K∗c^t(3)\hat k_{t+1}=\frac1\beta \hat k_t + (1-\alpha)\frac{Y^*}{K^*}\hat n_t - \frac{C^*}{K^*}\hat c_t\tag{3} k^t+1​=β1​k^t​+(1−α)K∗Y∗​n^t​−K∗C∗​c^t​(3)

ξ^t+1=ρDξ^t+εtD(4)\hat \xi_{t+1}=\rho_D \hat \xi_t + \varepsilon_t^D\tag{4} ξ^​t+1​=ρD​ξ^​t​+εtD​(4)

# Example 2 虚拟资本情况分析

本模型下仅考虑分散化经济

# A. 股票

居民决策

max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.Xt+1Pt+Ct=Xt(Pt+Πt)+WtNt\begin{align*}\max \quad & {\mathbb E_t}\sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ &\text{s.t.} \quad X_{t+1}P_t + C_t = X_t(P_t+ \Pi_t)+ W_tN_t\end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Xt+1​Pt​+Ct​=Xt​(Pt​+Πt​)+Wt​Nt​​

企业决策

Πt≜Yt−WtNtYt=AtNt1−α\Pi_t \triangleq Y_t -W_tN_t\\ Y_t = A_t N_t^{1-\alpha}Πt​≜Yt​−Wt​Nt​Yt​=At​Nt1−α​

市场出清

Yt=CtY_t = C_t Yt​=Ct​

Xt=1X_t = 1 Xt​=1

(1) 求居民的利润最大化条件

(2) 企业的利润最大化条件

(3) 写出均衡方程和稳态值

(4) 写出价格 ptp_tpt​ 的对数线性化

(5) 考虑 ln⁡At+1=(1−ρ)gˉA+ρln⁡At+εtA\ln A_{t+1} = (1-\rho) \bar g_A+ \rho \ln A_t+ \varepsilon_t^AlnAt+1​=(1−ρ)gˉ​A​+ρlnAt​+εtA​ 时的 p^t\hat p_tp^​t​ 的分析。

# B. 企业的垄断势力的分析

居民决策

max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k)s.t.Xt+1Pt+Ct=Xt(Pt+Πt)+WtNt\begin{align*}\max \quad & {\mathbb E_t}\sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k})\\ &\text{s.t.} \quad X_{t+1}P_t + C_t = X_t(P_t+ \Pi_t)+ W_tN_t\end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​)s.t.Xt+1​Pt​+Ct​=Xt​(Pt​+Πt​)+Wt​Nt​​

企业决策

Πt≜PtYt−WtNtYt=AtNt\Pi_t \triangleq P_tY_t -W_tN_t\\ Y_t = A_t N_tΠt​≜Pt​Yt​−Wt​Nt​Yt​=At​Nt​

Pt=μMCt=μWtAtP_t = \mu MC_t = \mu \frac{W_t}{A_t} Pt​=μMCt​=μAt​Wt​​

Pt=1P_t=1 Pt​=1

市场出清

Yt=CtY_t = C_t Yt​=Ct​

# C. 短期债券

居民决策

max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.Bt+1+Ct=RtBt+WtNt\begin{align*}\max \quad & {\mathbb E_t}\sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ &\text{s.t.} \quad B_{t+1} + C_t = R_tB_t+ W_tN_t\end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Bt+1​+Ct​=Rt​Bt​+Wt​Nt​​

企业决策

Πt≜Yt−WtNtYt=AtNt\Pi_t \triangleq Y_t -W_tN_t\\ Y_t = A_t N_tΠt​≜Yt​−Wt​Nt​Yt​=At​Nt​

市场出清

Yt=CtY_t = C_t Yt​=Ct​

Bt=0B_t = 0 Bt​=0

# D. 长期债券

居民决策

max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.Bt+1−κBt+Ct=RtBt+WtNt\begin{align*}\max \quad & {\mathbb E_t}\sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ &\text{s.t.} \quad B_{t+1} -\kappa B_t+ C_t = R_tB_t+ W_tN_t\end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Bt+1​−κBt​+Ct​=Rt​Bt​+Wt​Nt​​

企业决策

Πt≜Yt−WtNtYt=AtNt\Pi_t \triangleq Y_t -W_tN_t\\ Y_t = A_t N_tΠt​≜Yt​−Wt​Nt​Yt​=At​Nt​

市场出清

Yt=CtY_t = C_t Yt​=Ct​

Bt=0B_t = 0 Bt​=0

# ※ Example 3 垄断势力：微观基础

# A. 分散化经济

居民端

max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k),u=C1−σ1−σ−ηLN1+ϕ1+ϕs.t.Ct+Kt+1−(1−δ)Kt=RtKt+WtNt+Πt\begin{align*} \max\quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k}),\quad u= \frac{C^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\eta_L \frac{N^{1+\phi}}{1+\phi}\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad C_t + K_{t+1}-(1-\delta)K_t = R_t K_t + W_tN_t + \Pi_t \end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​),u=1−σC1−σ​−ηL​1+ϕN1+ϕ​s.t.Ct​+Kt+1​−(1−δ)Kt​=Rt​Kt​+Wt​Nt​+Πt​​

最终产品部门

Yt=[∫0Mtyt(i)1−1εdi]εε−1\begin{align*} Y_t = \left[\int_0^{M_t}y_t(i)^{1-\frac1\varepsilon}di\right]^{\frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}} \end{align*}Yt​=[∫0Mt​​yt​(i)1−ε1​di]ε−1ε​​

其中 MtM_tMt​ 为企业数，ε/(ε−1)=μ\varepsilon/(\varepsilon-1)=\muε/(ε−1)=μ。

Π=Yt−∫0Mtpt(i)yt(i)di\Pi = Y_t - \int_0^{M_t}p_t(i)y_t(i)di Π=Yt​−∫0Mt​​pt​(i)yt​(i)di

企业端

在已知 yt(i)=D(pt(i))y_t(i) = D(p_t(i))yt​(i)=D(pt​(i)) 时，求解

Πt(i)=pt(i)yt(i)−Rtkt(i)−Wtnt(i)\Pi_t(i) = p_t(i)y_t(i)-R_tk_t(i)-W_t n_t(i) Πt​(i)=pt​(i)yt​(i)−Rt​kt​(i)−Wt​nt​(i)

yt(i)=Atktα(i)nt1−α(i)y_t(i)=A_tk_t^{\alpha}(i)n_t^{1-\alpha}(i) yt​(i)=At​ktα​(i)nt1−α​(i)

市场出清

Πt=∫0MtΠt(i)di\Pi_t = \int_0^{M_t} \Pi_t (i)di Πt​=∫0Mt​​Πt​(i)di

Nt=∫0Mtnt(i)diN_t = \int_0^{M_t} n_t(i)di Nt​=∫0Mt​​nt​(i)di

Kt=∫0Mtkt(i)diK_t = \int_{0}^{M_t}k_t(i)di Kt​=∫0Mt​​kt​(i)di

（1） 求居民的 Euler 方程和劳动供给方程。

解：

Etβ∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)[Rt+1+1−δ]=1{\mathbb E}_t \beta \frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}[R_{t+1}+1-\delta]=1 Et​β∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​[Rt+1​+1−δ]=1

−∂u/∂N∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)=Wt-\frac{\partial u/\partial N}{\partial u/\partial C}(C_t,N_t)=W_t −∂u/∂C∂u/∂N​(Ct​,Nt​)=Wt​

（2） 最终厂商的情况

Πt=Yt−∫0Mtpt(i)yt(i)di⇒∂Yt∂yt(i)=pt(i),∀i∈[0,Mt]\Pi_t = Y_t -\int_0^{M_t}p_t(i)y_t(i)di\Rightarrow \frac{\partial Y_t}{\partial y_t(i)}= p_t(i) ,\forall i\in[0,M_t] Πt​=Yt​−∫0Mt​​pt​(i)yt​(i)di⇒∂yt​(i)∂Yt​​=pt​(i),∀i∈[0,Mt​]

Yt=[∫0Mtyt(i)1−1εdi]εε−1Y_t = \left[\int_0^{M_t}y_t(i)^{1-\frac{1}{\varepsilon}}di\right]^{\frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}} Yt​=[∫0Mt​​yt​(i)1−ε1​di]ε−1ε​

∂Yt∂yt(i)=Yt1/εyt(i)−1/ε\frac{\partial Y_t}{\partial y_t(i)}=Y_t^{1/\varepsilon}y_t(i)^{-1/\varepsilon} ∂yt​(i)∂Yt​​=Yt1/ε​yt​(i)−1/ε

可得需求函数

yt(i)=Ytpt(i)−εy_t(i)= Y_tp_t(i)^{-\varepsilon} yt​(i)=Yt​pt​(i)−ε

（3） 已知 D(pt(i))=Ytpt(i)−εD(p_t(i))= Y_tp_t(i)^{-\varepsilon}D(pt​(i))=Yt​pt​(i)−ε，求企业的利润最大化。

Πt(i)=pt(i)yt(i)−Rtkt(i)−Wtnt(i)\Pi_t(i) = p_t(i)y_t(i) -R_tk_t(i)-W_tn_t(i) Πt​(i)=pt​(i)yt​(i)−Rt​kt​(i)−Wt​nt​(i)

Pt(i)=Yt1/εYt(i)−1/εP_t(i)= Y_t^{1/\varepsilon} Y_t(i)^{-1/\varepsilon} Pt​(i)=Yt1/ε​Yt​(i)−1/ε

yt(i)=Atkt(i)αnt(i)1−αy_t(i) = A_t k_t(i)^\alpha n_t(i)^{1-\alpha} yt​(i)=At​kt​(i)αnt​(i)1−α

可得

Πt(i)=YtAt1−1/εkt(i)α(1−1/ε)nt(i)(1−α)(1−1/ε)⏟pt(i)yt(i)−Rtkt(i)−Wtnt(i)\Pi_t(i)= \underbrace{Y_tA_t^{1-1/\varepsilon}k_t(i)^{\alpha(1-1/\varepsilon)}n_t(i)^{(1-\alpha)(1-1/\varepsilon)}}_{p_t(i)y_t(i)}-R_tk_t(i)-W_tn_t(i) Πt​(i)=pt​(i)yt​(i)Yt​At1−1/ε​kt​(i)α(1−1/ε)nt​(i)(1−α)(1−1/ε)​​−Rt​kt​(i)−Wt​nt​(i)

可得

{α(1−1ε)pt(i)yt(i)=Rtkt(i)(1−α)(1−1ε)pt(i)yt(i)=Wtnt(i)yt(i)=Atkt(i)αnt(i)1−α⇒pt(i)=εε−11At(Rtα)α(Wt1−α)1−α,∀i\begin{cases}\alpha(1-\frac{1}{\varepsilon})p_t(i)y_t(i)=R_tk_t(i)\\ (1-\alpha)\left( 1-\frac1\varepsilon\right)p_t(i)y_t(i)=W_tn_t(i)\\ y_t(i)=A_tk_t(i)^{\alpha}n_t(i)^{1-\alpha} \end{cases}\Rightarrow p_t(i)=\frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}\frac1{A_t}\left( \frac{R_t}{\alpha}\right)^{\alpha}\left( \frac{W_t}{1-\alpha}\right)^{1-\alpha},\forall i⎩⎨⎧​α(1−ε1​)pt​(i)yt​(i)=Rt​kt​(i)(1−α)(1−ε1​)pt​(i)yt​(i)=Wt​nt​(i)yt​(i)=At​kt​(i)αnt​(i)1−α​⇒pt​(i)=ε−1ε​At​1​(αRt​​)α(1−αWt​​)1−α,∀i

因此，∀i∈[0,Mt],pt(i)\forall i\in[0,M_t],p_t(i)∀i∈[0,Mt​],pt​(i) 相同，从而 yt(i)y_t(i)yt​(i) 与 nt(i),kt(i)n_t(i),k_t(i)nt​(i),kt​(i) 均相同，结合

Nt=∫0Mtnt(i)diN_t = \int_0^{M_t} n_t(i)di Nt​=∫0Mt​​nt​(i)di

Kt=∫0Mtkt(i)diK_t = \int_{0}^{M_t}k_t(i)di Kt​=∫0Mt​​kt​(i)di

Yt=∫0Mtpt(i)yt(i)diY_t = \int_0^{M_t} p_t(i)y_t(i)di Yt​=∫0Mt​​pt​(i)yt​(i)di

可得

RtKt=(1−1ε)αYtR_tK_t= \left( 1-\frac1\varepsilon\right)\alpha Y_t Rt​Kt​=(1−ε1​)αYt​

WtNt=(1−1ε)(1−α)YtW_tN_t=\left(1-\frac1\varepsilon \right) (1-\alpha)Y_t Wt​Nt​=(1−ε1​)(1−α)Yt​

且

kt(i)=KtMtk_t(i)=\frac{K_t}{M_t} kt​(i)=Mt​Kt​​

nt(i)=NtMtn_t(i)=\frac{N_t}{M_t} nt​(i)=Mt​Nt​​

yt(i)=AtKtαNt1−αMty_t(i)=\frac{A_tK_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}}{M_t} yt​(i)=Mt​At​Ktα​Nt1−α​​

可得

Yt=[∫0Mtyt(i)1−1/εdi]εε−1=Mt1ε−1AtKtαNt1−αY_t = \left[\int_0^{M_t}y_t(i)^{1-1/\varepsilon}di\right]^{\frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}}=M_t^{\frac1{\varepsilon-1}}A_t K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha} Yt​=[∫0Mt​​yt​(i)1−1/εdi]ε−1ε​=Mtε−11​​At​Ktα​Nt1−α​

pt(i)yt(i)=YtMt=AtKtαNt1−αMtεε−1p_t(i)y_t(i)= \frac{Y_t}{M_t}= \frac{A_t K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}}{M_t^{\frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}}} pt​(i)yt​(i)=Mt​Yt​​=Mtε−1ε​​At​Ktα​Nt1−α​​

Πt(i)=1εpt(i)yt(i)=1εAtKtαNt1−αMtεε−1\Pi_t(i)=\frac1\varepsilon p_t(i) y_t(i) =\frac1\varepsilon\frac{A_t K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}}{M_t^{\frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}}} Πt​(i)=ε1​pt​(i)yt​(i)=ε1​Mtε−1ε​​At​Ktα​Nt1−α​​

（4） 市场均衡，若 ln⁡Mt+1=ρMln⁡Mt+(1−ρA)ln⁡Mˉ+εtM\ln M_{t+1}= \rho _M \ln M_t + (1-\rho_A)\ln \bar M+ \varepsilon_t^MlnMt+1​=ρM​lnMt​+(1−ρA​)lnMˉ+εtM​；ln⁡At+1=ρAln⁡At+εtA\ln A_{t+1}= \rho_A \ln A_t + \varepsilon_t^AlnAt+1​=ρA​lnAt​+εtA​。εtA∼N(0,σA2)\varepsilon_t^A \sim N(0,\sigma_A^2)εtA​∼N(0,σA2​)；εtM∼N(0,σM2)\varepsilon_t^M \sim N_(0,\sigma_M^2)εtM​∼N(​0,σM2​)；Mˉ=1\bar M=1Mˉ=1。求稳态。

解：

I-S 曲线

Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σ[Rt+1+1−δ]=1(1){\mathbb E}_t \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma} [R_{t+1}+1-\delta]=1\tag1 Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ[Rt+1​+1−δ]=1(1)

A-S 曲线

Wt=ηLCtσNtϕ(2)W_t = \eta_L C_t^\sigma N_t^{\phi}\tag2 Wt​=ηL​Ctσ​Ntϕ​(2)

劳动报酬占比（劳动需求）

WtNt=(1−1ε)(1−α)Yt(3)W_tN_t = \left(1-\frac1\varepsilon \right)(1-\alpha)Y_t\tag3 Wt​Nt​=(1−ε1​)(1−α)Yt​(3)

资本报酬占比（资本需求）

RtKt=(1−1ε)αYt(4)R_t K_t = \left( 1-\frac1\varepsilon\right)\alpha Y_t \tag4 Rt​Kt​=(1−ε1​)αYt​(4)

生产技术

Yt=Mt1/(ε−1)AtKtαNt1−α(5)Y_t = M_t^{1/(\varepsilon -1)}A_t K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}\tag5 Yt​=Mt1/(ε−1)​At​Ktα​Nt1−α​(5)

市场出清

Yt=Ct+It(6)Y_t = C_t + I_t\tag6 Yt​=Ct​+It​(6)

资本积累

Kt+1=(1−δ)Kt+It(7)K_{t+1}=(1-\delta)K_t + I_t\tag7 Kt+1​=(1−δ)Kt​+It​(7)

由 (1) 可得

R∗=1β−1+δR^* = \frac1\beta -1+ \delta R∗=β1​−1+δ

代入 (4)，令 α~=(1−1ε)α\tilde \alpha = (1-\frac1\varepsilon)\alphaα~=(1−ε1​)α 可得

K∗=α~Y∗R∗K^* = \frac{\tilde \alpha Y^*}{R^*} K∗=R∗α~Y∗​

代入 (5) 可得

N∗=(R∗α~)α1−αY∗(8)N^* = \left( \frac{R^*}{\tilde \alpha}\right)^{\frac{\alpha}{1-\alpha}}Y^*\tag{8} N∗=(α~R∗​)1−αα​Y∗(8)

代入 (3) 可得

W∗=(1−1ε)(1−α)(R∗α~)α/(1−α)(9)W^* = \left( 1-\frac1\varepsilon\right)(1-\alpha)\left( \frac{R^*}{\tilde \alpha}\right)^{\alpha/(1-\alpha)}\tag9 W∗=(1−ε1​)(1−α)(α~R∗​)α/(1−α)(9)

代入 (7) 可得

I∗=δK∗=α~δR∗Y∗I^* = \delta K^* = \frac{\tilde \alpha \delta}{R^*}Y^* I∗=δK∗=R∗α~δ​Y∗

代入 (6) 可得

C∗=(1−α~δR∗)Y∗(10)C^* = \left( 1-\frac{\tilde \alpha \delta}{R^*}\right)Y^*\tag{10} C∗=(1−R∗α~δ​)Y∗(10)

将 (7)(8)(9) 代入 W∗=ηL(C∗)σ(N∗)ϕW^* = \eta_L(C^*)^\sigma (N^*)^\phiW∗=ηL​(C∗)σ(N∗)ϕ 可得 Y∗Y^*Y∗。

之后可获得 I∗,C∗,N∗,K∗I^*,C^*,N^*,K^*I∗,C∗,N∗,K∗。

（5） 对数线性化

−σEtc^t+1+σc^t+βR∗Etr^t+1=0(1)-\sigma{\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1} + \sigma \hat c_t + \beta R^* {\mathbb E}_t \hat r_{t+1}=0\tag1 −σEt​c^t+1​+σc^t​+βR∗Et​r^t+1​=0(1)

w^t=σc^t+ϕn^t(2)\hat w_t = \sigma \hat c_t + \phi \hat n_t \tag2 w^t​=σc^t​+ϕn^t​(2)

w^t+n^t=y^t(3)\hat w_t + \hat n_t = \hat y_t\tag3 w^t​+n^t​=y^​t​(3)

r^t+k^t=y^t(4)\hat r_t + \hat k_t = \hat y_t\tag4 r^t​+k^t​=y^​t​(4)

y^t=1ε−1m^t+a^t+αk^t+(1−α)n^t(5)\hat y_t = \frac1{\varepsilon -1}\hat m_t + \hat a_t + \alpha \hat k_t + (1-\alpha)\hat n_t \tag5 y^​t​=ε−11​m^t​+a^t​+αk^t​+(1−α)n^t​(5)

c^tC∗Y∗+i^tI∗Y∗=y^t(6)\hat c_t \frac{C^*}{Y^*}+ \hat i_t \frac{I^*}{Y^*}= \hat y_t\tag6 c^t​Y∗C∗​+i^t​Y∗I∗​=y^​t​(6)

k^t+1=(1−δ)k^t+i^t(7)\hat k_{t+1}=(1-\delta)\hat k_t + \hat i_t \tag7 k^t+1​=(1−δ)k^t​+i^t​(7)

a^t+1=ρAa^t+εtA(8)\hat a_ {t+1}= \rho_A \hat a_t + \varepsilon_t^A\tag8 a^t+1​=ρA​a^t​+εtA​(8)

m^t+1=ρMm^t+εtM(9)\hat m_{t+1}=\rho_M \hat m_{t} + \varepsilon_t^M\tag9 m^t+1​=ρM​m^t​+εtM​(9)

（6） 写出中央计划者问题，并分析与分散决策的差别。

解：

V(Kt,Mt,At)≜max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.Kt+1=Yt−Ct+(1−δ)Kt∫0Mtkt(i)di=Kt∫0Mtnt(i)di=NtYt=[∫0Mt(yt(i))1−1/εdi]ε/(ε−1)yt(i)=Atktα(i)nt1−α(i)\begin{align*}V(K_t,M_t,A_t)\triangleq \max \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad K_{t+1}= Y_t -C_t + (1-\delta)K_t\\ & \quad \quad \; \int_0^{M_t} k_t(i)di = K_t\\ & \quad \quad \; \int_0^{M_t} n_t(i)di = N_t\\ & \quad \quad \; Y_t = \left[\int_0^{M_t} (y_t(i))^{1-1/\varepsilon}di \right]^{\varepsilon/(\varepsilon-1)}\\ & \quad \quad \; y_t(i)= A_tk_t^\alpha(i)n_t^{1-\alpha}(i) \end{align*}V(Kt​,Mt​,At​)≜max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Kt+1​=Yt​−Ct​+(1−δ)Kt​∫0Mt​​kt​(i)di=Kt​∫0Mt​​nt​(i)di=Nt​Yt​=[∫0Mt​​(yt​(i))1−1/εdi]ε/(ε−1)yt​(i)=At​ktα​(i)nt1−α​(i)​

无约束最优化

V(Kt,Mt,At)≜max⁡u(Ct,Nt)+βEtV(Kt+1,Mt+1,At+1)−λtB[Kt+1−Yt+Ct−(1−δ)Kt]−λtY{Yt−[∫0Mt(yt(i))1−1/εdi]ε/(ε−1)}−∫0Mtλt(i)[yt(i)−Atktα(i)nt1−α(i)]di−λtK[∫0Mtkt(i)di−Kt]−λtN[∫0Mtnt(i)di−Nt]\begin{align*}V(K_t,M_t,A_t)\triangleq \max \quad & u(C_{t},N_{t})+\beta{\mathbb E}_tV(K_{t+1},M_{t+1},A_{t+1}) \\ &\quad -\lambda_t^B[ K_{t+1}- Y_t +C_t - (1-\delta)K_t]\\ &\quad -\lambda_t^Y \left\{ Y_t- \left[\int_0^{M_t} (y_t(i))^{1-1/\varepsilon}di \right]^{\varepsilon/(\varepsilon-1)}\right\}\\ &\quad -\int_0^{M_t} \lambda_t(i)[y_t(i)-A_tk_t^\alpha(i)n_t^{1-\alpha}(i)]di\\ & \quad -\lambda_t^K [\int_0^{M_t} k_t(i)di-K_t]\\ & \quad -\lambda_t^N [\int_0^{M_t} n_t(i)di - N_t]\\ \end{align*}V(Kt​,Mt​,At​)≜max​u(Ct​,Nt​)+βEt​V(Kt+1​,Mt+1​,At+1​)−λtB​[Kt+1​−Yt​+Ct​−(1−δ)Kt​]−λtY​⎩⎨⎧​Yt​−[∫0Mt​​(yt​(i))1−1/εdi]ε/(ε−1)⎭⎬⎫​−∫0Mt​​λt​(i)[yt​(i)−At​ktα​(i)nt1−α​(i)]di−λtK​[∫0Mt​​kt​(i)di−Kt​]−λtN​[∫0Mt​​nt​(i)di−Nt​]​

FOCs

∂u∂C(Ct,Nt)=λtB(1)\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_t,N_t)=\lambda_t^B\tag1 ∂C∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=λtB​(1)

λtB=Etβ∂V∂K(Kt+1;At+1,Mt+1)(2)\lambda_t^B = {\mathbb E}_t \beta \frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_{t+1};A_{t+1},M_{t+1})\tag2 λtB​=Et​β∂K∂V​(Kt+1​;At+1​,Mt+1​)(2)

包络定理

∂V∂Kt=λtB(1−δ)+λtK\frac{\partial V}{\partial K_t}= \lambda_t^B(1-\delta) + \lambda_t^K ∂Kt​∂V​=λtB​(1−δ)+λtK​

λtB=λtY(3)\lambda_t^B=\lambda_t^Y\tag3 λtB​=λtY​(3)

Yt1/εyt(i)−1/ελtY=λt(i)(4)Y_t^{1/\varepsilon}y_t(i)^{-1/\varepsilon}\lambda_t^Y=\lambda_t(i)\tag4 Yt1/ε​yt​(i)−1/ελtY​=λt​(i)(4)

λt(i)Atkt(i)αnt(i)1−αα=λtKkt(i)(5)\lambda_t(i)A_t k_t(i)^\alpha n_t(i)^{1-\alpha} \alpha = \lambda_t^K k_t(i)\tag5 λt​(i)At​kt​(i)αnt​(i)1−αα=λtK​kt​(i)(5)

λt(i)Atkt(i)αnt(i)1−α(1−α)=λtNnt(i)(6)\lambda_t(i)A_tk_t(i)^\alpha n_t(i)^{1-\alpha}(1-\alpha)= \lambda_t^N n_t(i)\tag6 λt​(i)At​kt​(i)αnt​(i)1−α(1−α)=λtN​nt​(i)(6)

−∂u∂N(Ct,Nt)=λtN(7)-\frac{\partial u}{\partial N}(C_t,N_t) = \lambda_t^N\tag7 −∂N∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=λtN​(7)

令 Wt≜λtN/λtYW_t \triangleq \lambda_t^N/\lambda_t^YWt​≜λtN​/λtY​；Rt≜λtK/λtYR_t \triangleq \lambda_t^K/\lambda_t^YRt​≜λtK​/λtY​；pt(i)≜λt(i)/λtYp_t(i)\triangleq \lambda_t(i)/\lambda_t^Ypt​(i)≜λt​(i)/λtY​，改写上述方程

αpt(i)yt(i)=Rtkt(i)(5)\alpha p_t(i)y_t(i)=R_tk_t(i)\tag5 αpt​(i)yt​(i)=Rt​kt​(i)(5)

(1−α)pt(i)yt(i)=Wtnt(i)(6)(1-\alpha)p_t (i) y_t(i)= W_tn_t(i)\tag6 (1−α)pt​(i)yt​(i)=Wt​nt​(i)(6)

yt(i)=pt(i)−εYt(4)y_t(i)=p_t(i)^{-\varepsilon}Y_t\tag{4} yt​(i)=pt​(i)−εYt​(4)

对 KtK_tKt​ 进行包络

∂V∂K(Kt;Mt,At)=Rt+1−δ\frac{\partial V}{\partial K}(K_t;M_t,A_t)= R_t + 1-\delta ∂K∂V​(Kt​;Mt​,At​)=Rt​+1−δ

代入 (1) 和 (2) 可得

Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σ(Rt+1+1−δ)=1{\mathbb E}_t \beta\left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t }\right)^{-\sigma}(R_{t+1}+1-\delta)=1 Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ(Rt+1​+1−δ)=1

−∂u/∂N(Ct,Nt)∂/∂C(Ct,Nt)=Wt(7)-\frac{\partial u/\partial N(C_t,N_t)}{\partial /\partial C(C_t,N_t)}=W_t\tag7 −∂/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂N(Ct​,Nt​)​=Wt​(7)

配合

Kt+1=Yt−Ct+(1−δ)Kt∫0Mtkt(i)di=Kt∫0Mtnt(i)di=NtYt=[∫0Mt(yt(i))1−1/εdi]ε/(ε−1)yt(i)=Atktα(i)nt1−α(i)\begin{align*} & K_{t+1}= Y_t -C_t + (1-\delta)K_t\\ & \int_0^{M_t} k_t(i)di = K_t\\ & \int_0^{M_t} n_t(i)di = N_t\\ & Y_t = \left[\int_0^{M_t} (y_t(i))^{1-1/\varepsilon}di \right]^{\varepsilon/(\varepsilon-1)}\\ & y_t(i)= A_tk_t^\alpha(i)n_t^{1-\alpha}(i) \end{align*}​Kt+1​=Yt​−Ct​+(1−δ)Kt​∫0Mt​​kt​(i)di=Kt​∫0Mt​​nt​(i)di=Nt​Yt​=[∫0Mt​​(yt​(i))1−1/εdi]ε/(ε−1)yt​(i)=At​ktα​(i)nt1−α​(i)​

可以化为加总方程

I-S 曲线

Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σ[Rt+1+1−δ]=1(1){\mathbb E}_t \beta\left(\frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t} \right)^{-\sigma}[R_{t+1}+1-\delta]=1\tag1 Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σ[Rt+1​+1−δ]=1(1)

A-S 曲线

Wt=ηLCtσNtϕ(2)W_t = \eta_L C_t^\sigma N_t^\phi\tag2 Wt​=ηL​Ctσ​Ntϕ​(2)

劳动报酬占比

WtNt=(1−α)Yt(3)W_tN_t=(1-\alpha)Y_t\tag3 Wt​Nt​=(1−α)Yt​(3)

资本报酬占比

RtKt=αYt(4)R_tK_t = \alpha Y_t\tag4 Rt​Kt​=αYt​(4)

生产技术

Yt=Mt1/(ε−1)AtKtαNt1−α(5)Y_t = M_t^{1/(\varepsilon-1)} A_t K_t^\alpha N_t^{1-\alpha}\tag5 Yt​=Mt1/(ε−1)​At​Ktα​Nt1−α​(5)

市场出清

Yt=Ct+It(6)Y_t = C_t + I_t \tag6 Yt​=Ct​+It​(6)

资本积累

Kt+1=(1−δ)Kt+It(7)K_{t+1}=(1-\delta)K_t + I_t\tag7 Kt+1​=(1−δ)Kt​+It​(7)

# B. 虚拟资本，债券形式

居民

max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k),u(Ct,Nt)=Ct1−σ1−σ−ηLNt1+ϕ1+ϕs.t.Ct+Bt+1=RtBt+WtNt+Πt\begin{align*}\max\quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k}),\quad u(C_t,N_t)=\frac{C_t^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\eta_L \frac{N_t^{1+\phi}}{1+ \phi}\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad C_t + B_{t+1}=R_t B_t + W_t N_t + \Pi_t \end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​),u(Ct​,Nt​)=1−σCt1−σ​​−ηL​1+ϕNt1+ϕ​​s.t.Ct​+Bt+1​=Rt​Bt​+Wt​Nt​+Πt​​

最终厂商

Yt=[∫0Mtyt(i)1−1/εdi]ε/(ε−1)Y_t = \left[\int_0^{M_t} y_t(i)^{1-1/\varepsilon}di\right]^{\varepsilon/(\varepsilon-1)} Yt​=[∫0Mt​​yt​(i)1−1/εdi]ε/(ε−1)

Πt=Yt−∫0Mtpt(i)yt(i)di\Pi_t = Y_t -\int_0^{M_t} p_t(i) y_t(i)di Πt​=Yt​−∫0Mt​​pt​(i)yt​(i)di

企业行为

Πt(i)=pt(i)yt(i)−wtnt(i)\Pi_t(i) = p_t(i) y_t(i) - w_tn_t(i) Πt​(i)=pt​(i)yt​(i)−wt​nt​(i)

yt(i)=Atnt(i)y_t(i) = A_tn_t(i) yt​(i)=At​nt​(i)

市场出清

Πt=∫0Mtπt(i)di\Pi_t = \int_0^{M_t} \pi_t (i) di Πt​=∫0Mt​​πt​(i)di

Nt=∫0Mtnt(i)diN_t = \int_{0}^{M_t} n_t(i)di Nt​=∫0Mt​​nt​(i)di

Bt=0B_t= 0 Bt​=0

Ct=YtC_t= Y_t Ct​=Yt​

解：

市场均衡方程

欧拉方程

Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σRt+1=1(1){\mathbb E}_t \beta \left(\frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t} \right)^{-\sigma} R_{t+1}=1\tag1 Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σRt+1​=1(1)

劳动供给

Wt=ηLCtσNtϕ(2)W_t = \eta_L C_t^\sigma N_t^{\phi}\tag2 Wt​=ηL​Ctσ​Ntϕ​(2)

市场出清

Ct=YtC_t=Y_t Ct​=Yt​

劳动工资

WtNt=(1−1ε)Yt(4)W_tN_t =\left( 1-\frac1\varepsilon\right)Y_t \tag4 Wt​Nt​=(1−ε1​)Yt​(4)

生产函数

Yt=AtMt1/(ε−1)Nt(5)Y_t = A_t M_t^{1/(\varepsilon-1)}N_t\tag5 Yt​=At​Mt1/(ε−1)​Nt​(5)

后略

# C. 股票定价

居民

max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k),u(C,N)=C1−σ1−σ−ηLN1+ϕ1+ϕs.t.∫0Mtxt+1(i)pt(i)di+Ct=∫0Mtxt(i)(πt(i)+pt(i))di+WtNt\begin{align*} \max \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k}),\quad u(C,N)= \frac{C^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\eta_L \frac{N^{1+ \phi}}{1+ \phi}\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad \int_0^{M_t} x_{t+1}(i)p_t(i)di + C_t = \int_0^{M_t} x_t(i) (\pi_t(i)+ p_t(i))di+W_tN_t \end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​),u(C,N)=1−σC1−σ​−ηL​1+ϕN1+ϕ​s.t.∫0Mt​​xt+1​(i)pt​(i)di+Ct​=∫0Mt​​xt​(i)(πt​(i)+pt​(i))di+Wt​Nt​​

最终厂商

Yt=(∫0Mtyt(i)1−1/εdi)ε/(ε−1Y_t = \left( \int_0^{M_t} y_t(i)^{1-1/\varepsilon}di\right)^{\varepsilon/(\varepsilon-1} Yt​=(∫0Mt​​yt​(i)1−1/εdi)ε/(ε−1

ΠtF=Yt−∫0Mtpt(i)yt(i)di\Pi_t^F = Y_t - \int_0^{M_t} p_t(i) y_t(i)di ΠtF​=Yt​−∫0Mt​​pt​(i)yt​(i)di

企业

πt(i)=pt(i)yt(i)−Wtnt(i)\pi_t(i)= p_t(i)y_t(i)-W_tn_t(i) πt​(i)=pt​(i)yt​(i)−Wt​nt​(i)

yt(i)=Atnt(i)y_t(i) =A_tn_t(i) yt​(i)=At​nt​(i)

市场出清

xt(i)=1,∀i∈[0,Mt]x_t(i) = 1,\forall i\in [0,M_t] xt​(i)=1,∀i∈[0,Mt​]

Ct=YtC_t = Y_t Ct​=Yt​

∫0Mtnt(i)di=Nt\int_0^{M_t} n_t(i)di=N_t ∫0Mt​​nt​(i)di=Nt​

解：

∀i∈[0,Mt],Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σpt+1+πt+1(i)pt(i)=1\forall i\in[0,M_t], \quad {\mathbb E}_t \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma}\frac{p_{t+1}+ \pi_{t+1}(i)}{p_t (i)}=1 ∀i∈[0,Mt​],Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σpt​(i)pt+1​+πt+1​(i)​=1

∀i∈[0,Mt]\forall i \in [0,M_t]∀i∈[0,Mt​]，pt(i),πt(i)p_t(i),\pi_t(i)pt​(i),πt​(i) 相同。令 pt(i)≡pt,πt(i)≡πtp_t(i)\equiv p_t,\pi_t(i)\equiv \pi_tpt​(i)≡pt​,πt​(i)≡πt​，可得市场均衡

Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σpt+1+πt+1pt=1(1){\mathbb E}_t \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma} \frac{p_{t+1}+ \pi_{t+1}}{p_t}=1\tag1 Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σpt​pt+1​+πt+1​​=1(1)

Πt+1=1εYtMt(2)\Pi_{t+1} = \frac1\varepsilon \frac{Y_t}{M_t} \tag2 Πt+1​=ε1​Mt​Yt​​(2)

Yt=AtMt1/(ε−1)Nt(3)Y_t = A_t M_t ^{1/(\varepsilon-1)} N_t\tag3 Yt​=At​Mt1/(ε−1)​Nt​(3)

Wt=θCtσNtϕ(4)W_t = \theta C_t^\sigma N_t ^\phi \tag4 Wt​=θCtσ​Ntϕ​(4)

Yt=Ct(5)Y_t =C_t\tag5 Yt​=Ct​(5)

WtNt=(1−1ε)Yt(6)W_t N_t = \left( 1- \frac1\varepsilon\right)Y_t\tag6 Wt​Nt​=(1−ε1​)Yt​(6)

# D. 内生企业数目

居民

max⁡Et∑k=0∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k),u(C,N)=C1−σ1−σ−ηLN1+ϕ1+ϕs.t.Xt+1(Mt+Mt,E)pt+Ct=(πt+pt)MtXt+WtNtMt+1=(Mt+Mt,E)(1−δ)\begin{align*} \max \quad &{\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k}),\quad u(C,N)= \frac{C^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\eta_L\frac{ N^{1+\phi}}{1+ \phi}\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad X_{t+1} (M_t+ M_{t,E})p_t +C_t= (\pi_t + p_t)M_t X_t+ W_t N_t\\ & \quad \quad \; M_{t+1}= (M_t + M_{t,E})(1-\delta) \end{align*}max​Et​k=0∑∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​),u(C,N)=1−σC1−σ​−ηL​1+ϕN1+ϕ​s.t.Xt+1​(Mt​+Mt,E​)pt​+Ct​=(πt​+pt​)Mt​Xt​+Wt​Nt​Mt+1​=(Mt​+Mt,E​)(1−δ)​

企业

Ct=Mt1/(ε−1)AtNtPC_t = M_t^{1/(\varepsilon-1)}A_t N_t^P Ct​=Mt1/(ε−1)​At​NtP​

πt=1εCtMt\pi_t = \frac1\varepsilon \frac{C_t}{M_t} πt​=ε1​Mt​Ct​​

Wt=(1−1ε)CtNtPW_t = \left( 1- \frac1\varepsilon\right)\frac{C_t}{N_t^P} Wt​=(1−ε1​)NtP​Ct​​

市场出清

pt=fEWtZt(进入成本)p_t = \frac{f_E W_t }{Z_t}\tag{进入成本} pt​=Zt​fE​Wt​​(进入成本)

NtP+ME,tfEZt=Nt(劳动力市场出清)N_t ^P + M_{E,t} \frac{f_E}{Z_t}= N_t \tag{劳动力市场出清} NtP​+ME,t​Zt​fE​​=Nt​(劳动力市场出清)

解：

Euler 方程

Etβ(1−δ)(Ct+1Ct)−σpt+1+πt+1pt=1(1){\mathbb E}_t \beta (1-\delta)\left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma} \frac{p_{t+1}+ \pi_{t+1}}{p_t}=1\tag1 Et​β(1−δ)(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σpt​pt+1​+πt+1​​=1(1)

劳动供给

Wt=ηLCtσNtϕ(2)W_t = \eta_LC_t ^\sigma N_t^\phi\tag2 Wt​=ηL​Ctσ​Ntϕ​(2)

消费

Ct=AtMt1/(ε−1)NtP(3)C_t =A_t M_t ^{1/(\varepsilon-1)}N_t^P\tag3 Ct​=At​Mt1/(ε−1)​NtP​(3)

利润

Πt=1εCtMt(4)\Pi_t = \frac1\varepsilon \frac{C_t}{M_t}\tag4 Πt​=ε1​Mt​Ct​​(4)

工资

Wt=(1−1ε)AtMt1/(ε−1)(5)W_t = \left( 1-\frac1\varepsilon\right)A_t M_t^{1/(\varepsilon-1)}\tag5 Wt​=(1−ε1​)At​Mt1/(ε−1)​(5)

企业数目

Mt+1=(1−δ)(Mt+Mt,E)(6)M_{t+1}=(1-\delta)(M_t+ M_{t,E})\tag6 Mt+1​=(1−δ)(Mt​+Mt,E​)(6)

企业进入条件

fEWtZt=pt(7)\frac{f_E W_t }{Z_t} = p_t\tag7 Zt​fE​Wt​​=pt​(7)

劳动市场

NtP+ME,tfEZt=Nt(8)N_t^P +\frac{ M_{E,t} f_E}{Z_t} = N_t \tag8 NtP​+Zt​ME,t​fE​​=Nt​(8)
